```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

const STEPS = ['看', '描', '写', '默']

export default function Stage5Write({ lesson, onComplete }) {
  const chars = lesson.writingChars
  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [done, setDone] = useState([])

  const currentChar = chars[charIdx]
  const isLastChar = charIdx === chars.length - 1
  const isLastStep = step === STEPS.length - 1

  function nextStep() {
    if (!isLastStep) {
      setStep(s => s + 1)
      return
    }
    setDone(p => [...p, charIdx])
    if (!isLastChar) {
      setCharIdx(i => i + 1)
      setStep(0)
    } else {
      onComplete()
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="text-center">
        <div className="text-3xl mb-1">✍️</div>
        <h3 className="font-kai text-xl font-bold text-ink">书写练习</h3>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-0.5">用 Apple Pencil，认真写</p>
      </div>

      {/* Char selector */}
      <div className="flex gap-3 justify-center">
        {chars.map((ch, i) => (
          <button
            key={i}
            onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setStep(0) }}
            className="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
            style={
              i === charIdx
                ? { background: lesson.color, color: 'white', transform: 'scale(1.05)', boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)' }
                : done.includes(i)
                ? { background: '#EDFAF3', color: '#52B788' }
                : { background: '#F3F4F6', color: '#9CA3AF' }
            }
          >
            {done.includes(i) ? '✓' : ch}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Step tabs */}
      <div className="flex rounded-2xl bg-gray-100 p-1 gap-1">
        {STEPS.map((s, i) => (
          <button
            key={i}
            onClick={() => i <= step && setStep(i)}
            className="flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"
            style={
              i === step
                ? { background: lesson.color, color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)' }
                : i < step
                ? { color: '#9CA3AF' }
                : { color: '#D1D5DB' }
            }
          >
            {s}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Step content */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm" style={{ minHeight: 260 }}>
        {step === 0 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">观察字的结构，注意笔画顺序</p>
            <div
              className="w-48 h-48 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai text-8xl font-bold border-4"
              style={{ color: lesson.color, borderColor: lesson.bgLight, background: lesson.bgLight }}
            >
              {currentChar}
            </div>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">仔细看清楚了再继续</p>
          </div>
        )}
        {step === 1 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">用 Pencil 描红，感受每一笔</p>
            <WritingCanvas templateChar={currentChar} color={lesson.color} height={220} showTemplate showGrid />
          </div>
        )}
        {step === 2 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">旁边有范字，自己临写一遍</p>
            <div className="flex gap-3 items-start">
              <div
                className="w-20 h-20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai text-4xl font-bold shrink-0 border"
                style={{ color: lesson.color, opacity: 0.4, borderColor: lesson.bgLight, background: lesson.bgLight }}
              >
                {currentChar}
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1">
                <WritingCanvas color={lesson.color} height={160} showGrid />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
        {step === 3 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">凭记忆写，不看范字</p>
            <WritingCanvas color={lesson.color} height={220} showGrid />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <button
        onClick={nextStep}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-all"
        style={{ background: lesson.color }}
      >
        {isLastStep && isLastChar ? '完成！🎉' : isLastStep ? '下一个字 →' : `${STEPS[step + 1]} →`}
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

```

```css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

:root {
  --bg: #FDFBF4;
  --bg2: #F2EFE7;
  --card: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  --card-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  --text: #2D2417;
  --text2: #6B6058;
  --text3: #A09890;
  --shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.dark {
  --bg: #0F1117;
  --bg2: #1A1D27;
  --card: rgba(30,33,46,0.85);
  --card-border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  --text: #F0EDE8;
  --text2: #A09880;
  --text3: #605850;
  --shadow: rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
}

body {
  background-color: var(--bg);
  color: var(--text);
  font-family: "PingFang SC", -apple-system, sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  -webkit-user-select: none;
  user-select: none;
  touch-action: manipulation;
  transition: background-color 0.3s, color 0.3s;
}

/* Glass morphism */
.glass {
  background: var(--card);
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%);
  border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 24px var(--shadow), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
}

.glass-strong {
  background: var(--card);
  backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(200%);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(200%);
  border: 1px solid var(--card-border);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 40px var(--shadow), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
}

.font-kai { font-family: "Kaiti SC", "STKaiti", "楷体", serif; }

/* Animations */
@keyframes pop {
  0% { transform: scale(0.85); opacity: 0; }
  70% { transform: scale(1.04); }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
}
.animate-pop { animation: pop 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards; }

@keyframes float {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-8px); }
}
.animate-float { animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite; }

@keyframes slideUp {
  from { transform: translateY(16px); opacity: 0; }
  to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; }
}
.animate-slideUp { animation: slideUp 0.35s ease forwards; }

@keyframes shimmer {
  0% { background-position: -200% 0; }
  100% { background-position: 200% 0; }
}

canvas { touch-action: none; }

/* Scrollbar */
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--text3); border-radius: 2px; }
```

### `src/context/AppContext.jsx` - Create new file:
```jsx
import { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react'

const AppContext = createContext({})

export function AppProvider({ children }) {
  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false)
  const [penColor, setPenColor] = useState('#1A1A1A')

  function toggleDark() {
    setDarkMode(d => {
      const next = !d
      document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', next)
      return next
    })
  }

  return (
    <AppContext.Provider value={{ darkMode, toggleDark, penColor, setPenColor }}>
      {children}
    </AppContext.Provider>
  )
}

export function useApp() { return useContext(AppContext) }
```

### `src/main.jsx` - Wrap with AppProvider:
```jsx

)
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'

const COLORS = [
  { name: '墨黑', value: '#1A1A1A', light: '#1A1A1A', dark: '#E8E8E8' },
  { name: '朱红', value: '#E63946', light: '#E63946', dark: '#FF6B75' },
  { name: '靛蓝', value: '#1CB0F6', light: '#0077B6', dark: '#1CB0F6' },
  { name: '翠绿', value: '#58CC02', light: '#2D9B00', dark: '#58CC02' },
  { name: '紫罗', value: '#CE82FF', light: '#9B30D0', dark: '#CE82FF' },
  { name: '赭石', value: '#E9784A', light: '#C8540E', dark: '#FF9B6B' },
]

export default function ColorPalette() {
  const { penColor, setPenColor, darkMode } = useApp()
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)

  return (
    <div className="fixed top-4 right-4 z-50 flex flex-col items-end gap-2">
      {/* Main button */}
      <button
        onClick={() => setOpen(o => !o)}
        className="glass w-11 h-11 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:scale-90 transition-all"
        style={{ border: `2.5px solid ${penColor}` }}
        title="画笔颜色"
      >
        <div className="w-5 h-5 rounded-full shadow-inner" style={{ background: penColor }} />
      </button>

      {/* Color grid */}
      {open && (
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-3 flex flex-col gap-2 shadow-xl animate-slideUp">
          {COLORS.map(c => {
            const actualColor = darkMode ? c.dark : c.light
            return (
              <button
                key={c.value}
                onClick={() => { setPenColor(actualColor); setOpen(false) }}
                className="flex items-center gap-2.5 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors"
              >
                <div
                  className="w-7 h-7 rounded-full shadow-md shrink-0"
                  style={{
                    background: actualColor,
                    border: penColor === actualColor ? '2px solid white' : '2px solid transparent',
                    boxShadow: penColor === actualColor ? `0 0 0 2px ${actualColor}` : 'none',
                  }}
                />
                <span className="text-sm font-medium" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{c.name}</span>
              </button>
            )
          })}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

### `src/components/WritingCanvas.jsx` - Complete rewrite with brush calligraphy:
```jsx
import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'

export default function WritingCanvas({
  templateChar = '',
  height = 200,
  showTemplate = false,
  showGrid = false,
  overrideColor = null,
  className = '',
}) {
  const { penColor: ctxColor, darkMode } = useApp()
  const color = overrideColor || ctxColor

  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
  const drawing = useRef(false)
  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
  const points = useRef([]) // buffer for smooth bezier
  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    canvas.width = w * dpr
    canvas.height = height * dpr
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    ctxRef.current = ctx
    drawBackground(ctx, w, height)
  }, [height, showGrid, showTemplate, templateChar, darkMode])

  function drawBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    // Clear
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    
    const bgColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)' : 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)'
    ctx.fillStyle = bgColor
    roundRect(ctx, 0, 0, w, h, 12)
    ctx.fill()

    if (showGrid) {
      const gridColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
      ctx.strokeStyle = gridColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      // outer
      ctx.strokeRect(2, 2, w - 4, h - 4)
      // cross (dashed)
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 2)
      ctx.moveTo(2, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])
      // diagonals light
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h - 2)
      ctx.moveTo(w - 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(2, h - 2)
      ctx.stroke()
    }

    if (showTemplate && templateChar) {
      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.72}px "Kaiti SC", serif`
      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.07)'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
      ctx.fillText(templateChar, w / 2, h / 2)
    }
  }

  function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(x + r, y)
    ctx.lineTo(x + w - r, y)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + r)
    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - r)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - r, y + h)
    ctx.lineTo(x + r, y + h)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - r)
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + r)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + r, y)
    ctx.closePath()
  }

  function getBrushWidth(pressure, velocity) {
    const min = 1.5
    const max = 20
    const p = pressure > 0 ? Math.max(0.1, pressure) : 0.5
    // slower = wider (like a brush)
    const vFactor = Math.max(0.15, 1 - velocity * 0.06)
    return min + (max - min) * p * vFactor
  }

  function getPos(e, canvas) {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    return {
      x: e.clientX - rect.left,
      y: e.clientY - rect.top,
      pressure: e.pressure ?? 0.5,
    }
  }

  function drawBrushSegment(ctx, p1, p2, w1, w2, col) {
    if (!p1 || !p2) return
    const dx = p2.x - p1.x
    const dy = p2.y - p1.y
    const len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    if (len < 0.5) return

    // Perpendicular direction
    const nx = -dy / len
    const ny = dx / len

    // Draw tapered quad shape
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(p1.x + nx * w1 / 2, p1.y + ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x + nx * w2 / 2, p2.y + ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x - nx * w2 / 2, p2.y - ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(p1.x - nx * w1 / 2, p1.y - ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.closePath()
    ctx.fillStyle = col
    ctx.fill()

    // Ink bleed layer
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(p2.x, p2.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = col
    ctx.fill()
  }

  const onPointerDown = useCallback(e => {
    e.preventDefault()
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    drawing.current = true
    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0) }
    points.current = [pos]
    setHasDrawing(true)

    // Dot for tap
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0)
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = color
    ctx.fill()
  }, [color])

  const onPointerMove = useCallback(e => {
    if (!drawing.current) return
    e.preventDefault()
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    const now = Date.now()
    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
    const last = lastPoint.current
    if (!last) return

    const dx = pos.x - last.x
    const dy = pos.y - last.y
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    const velocity = dist / dt // px/ms
    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, velocity)

    drawBrushSegment(ctx, last, pos, last.width || w, w, color)

    lastTime.current = now
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: w }
  }, [color])

  const onPointerUp = useCallback(() => {
    drawing.current = false
    lastPoint.current = null
  }, [])

  function clear() {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    drawBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, height)
    setHasDrawing(false)
  }

  const bgStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' }
    : { background: 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' }

  return (
    <div className={`relative w-full ${className}`}>
      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        style={{ width: '100%', height, borderRadius: 14, cursor: 'crosshair', display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', ...bgStyle }}
        onPointerDown={onPointerDown}
        onPointerMove={onPointerMove}
        onPointerUp={onPointerUp}
        onPointerLeave={onPointerUp}
        onPointerCancel={onPointerUp}
      />
      {hasDrawing && (
        <button
          onClick={clear}
          className="absolute top-2 right-2 w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-all"
          style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}
        >✕</button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

### `src/App.jsx` - Add dark mode toggle and ColorPalette:
```jsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import HomePage from './components/HomePage'
import LessonPage from './components/LessonPage'
import CompletionPage from './components/CompletionPage'
import ColorPalette from './components/ColorPalette'
import { useApp } from './context/AppContext'

export default function App() {
  const [screen, setScreen] = useState('home')
  const [currentLesson, setCurrentLesson] = useState(null)
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(() => {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cy_progress') || '{}') }
    catch { return {} }
  })
  const { darkMode, toggleDark } = useApp()

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('cy_progress', JSON.stringify(progress))
  }, [progress])

  function markStageComplete(lessonId, stage) {
    setProgress(p => ({ ...p, [lessonId]: { ...p[lessonId], [stage]: true } }))
  }

  function getLessonProgress(lessonId) {
    return progress[lessonId] || {}
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      {/* Dark mode toggle - fixed top left */}
      <button
        onClick={toggleDark}
        className="fixed top-4 left-4 z-50 glass w-11 h-11 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-lg shadow-lg active:scale-90 transition-all"
        title={darkMode ? '切换白天' : '切换夜间'}
      >
        {darkMode ? '☀️' : '🌙'}
      </button>

      {/* Color palette - fixed top right */}
      <ColorPalette />

      {screen === 'home' && (
        <HomePage
          onSelectLesson={lesson => { setCurrentLesson(lesson); setScreen('lesson') }}
          progress={progress}
        />
      )}
      {screen === 'lesson' && currentLesson && (
        <LessonPage
          lesson={currentLesson}
          lessonProgress={getLessonProgress(currentLesson.id)}
          onStageComplete={stage => markStageComplete(currentLesson.id, stage)}
          onComplete={() => setScreen('complete')}
          onBack={() => setScreen('home')}
        />
      )}
      {screen === 'complete' && currentLesson && (
        <CompletionPage
          lesson={currentLesson}
          onBack={() => setScreen('home')}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

### `src/components/HomePage.jsx` - Glass + Duolingo style:
```jsx
import { lessons } from '../data/lessons'
import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'

function StagesDots({ lessonId, progress }) {
  const stages = ['listen', 'learn', 'read', 'think', 'write']
  const lp = progress[lessonId] || {}
  const done = stages.filter(s => lp[s]).length
  return (
    <div className="flex gap-1.5 items-center">
      {stages.map(s => (
        <div key={s} className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-all"
          style={{ background: lp[s] ? '#58CC02' : 'var(--text3)', transform: lp[s] ? 'scale(1.1)' : 'scale(1)' }} />
      ))}
      <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{done}/5</span>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function HomePage({ onSelectLesson, progress }) {
  return (
    <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-16 flex flex-col gap-10">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="text-center pt-8">
        <div className="text-5xl mb-4">📖</div>
        <h1 className="font-kai text-4xl font-bold mb-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>汉语言艺术</h1>
        <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>文言文·第一册</p>
      </div>

      {/* Lesson Cards */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-5">
        {lessons.map((lesson, i) => {
          const lp = progress[lesson.id] || {}
          const stages = ['listen', 'learn', 'read', 'think', 'write']
          const done = stages.filter(s => lp[s]).length
          const allDone = done === 5
          return (
            <button
              key={lesson.id}
              onClick={() => onSelectLesson(lesson)}
              className="glass w-full text-left rounded-3xl overflow-hidden active:scale-98 transition-all hover:shadow-xl"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-5 p-6">
                <div
                  className="w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai text-4xl font-bold shrink-0 shadow-lg"
                  style={{ background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${lesson.color}, ${lesson.color}CC)`, color: 'white' }}
                >
                  {lesson.coverChar}
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1.5">
                    <span className="font-kai text-xl font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{lesson.title}</span>
                    {allDone && (
                      <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>已完成 ✓</span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm mb-3" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{lesson.author}</p>
                  <StagesDots lessonId={lesson.id} progress={progress} />
                </div>
                <div className="text-4xl">{lesson.emoji}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="h-2" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
                <div
                  className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700"
                  style={{ width: `${(done / 5) * 100}%`, background: lesson.color }}
                />
              </div>
            </button>
          )
        })}
      </div>

      <p className="text-center text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>用 Apple Pencil 书写，效果更好 ✏️</p>
    </div>
  )
}
```

### `src/components/LessonPage.jsx` - Glass header:
```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import Stage1Listen from './stages/Stage1Listen'
import Stage2Learn from './stages/Stage2Learn'
import Stage3Read from './stages/Stage3Read'
import Stage4Think from './stages/Stage4Think'
import Stage5Write from './stages/Stage5Write'

const STAGES = [
  { id: 'listen', label: '听一听', emoji: '🎧' },
  { id: 'learn',  label: '认一认', emoji: '🔍' },
  { id: 'read',   label: '读一读', emoji: '📖' },
  { id: 'think',  label: '想一想', emoji: '💭' },
  { id: 'write',  label: '写一写', emoji: '✍️' },
]

export default function LessonPage({ lesson, lessonProgress, onStageComplete, onComplete, onBack }) {
  const firstIncomplete = STAGES.findIndex(s => !lessonProgress[s.id])
  const [activeStage, setActiveStage] = useState(firstIncomplete >= 0 ? firstIncomplete : 0)

  function handleStageComplete() {
    const stageId = STAGES[activeStage].id
    onStageComplete(stageId)
    if (activeStage < STAGES.length - 1) {
      setTimeout(() => setActiveStage(s => s + 1), 600)
    } else {
      setTimeout(onComplete, 800)
    }
  }

  const stageProps = { lesson, onComplete: handleStageComplete }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      {/* Glass header */}
      <div className="glass-strong sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 pl-16">
        <button
          onClick={onBack}
          className="glass w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-base transition-all active:scale-90"
          style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}
        >←</button>
        <div className="font-kai font-bold text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{lesson.title}</div>
        <div className="flex-1" />
        {/* Stage pills */}
        <div className="flex gap-1 pr-14">
          {STAGES.map((s, i) => (
            <button
              key={s.id}
              onClick={() => setActiveStage(i)}
              className="flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-medium transition-all"
              style={
                i === activeStage
                  ? { background: lesson.color, color: 'white', boxShadow: `0 2px 8px ${lesson.color}66` }
                  : lessonProgress[s.id]
                  ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
                  : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
              }
            >
              <span>{s.emoji}</span>
              <span className="hidden sm:inline">{s.label}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="pb-8">
        {activeStage === 0 && <Stage1Listen {...stageProps} />}
        {activeStage === 1 && <Stage2Learn {...stageProps} />}
        {activeStage === 2 && <Stage3Read {...stageProps} />}
        {activeStage === 3 && <Stage4Think {...stageProps} />}
        {activeStage === 4 && <Stage5Write {...stageProps} />}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

### `src/components/stages/Stage1Listen.jsx` - Glass cards, bigger fonts:
Update the existing file. The main changes are:
1. Replace `bg-white` with `glass` class
2. Replace hardcoded colors with CSS variables
3. Increase font sizes
4. Use Duolingo-style button for continue

Key replacements in the file:
- All `bg-white rounded-2xl` → `glass rounded-2xl`
- All `text-gray-500` → use `style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}`  
- All `text-gray-400` → use `style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}`
- All `text-ink` → use `style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}`
- `bg-gray-50` → use `style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)' }}`
- Continue button: add `boxShadow: \`0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99\`` for Duolingo button style

Rewrite the entire Stage1Listen.jsx:
```jsx
import { useState, useRef } from 'react'

export default function Stage1Listen({ lesson, onComplete }) {
  const [playing, setPlaying] = useState(false)
  const [currentSentence, setCurrentSentence] = useState(-1)
  const [stars, setStars] = useState([])
  const [answered, setAnswered] = useState(null)
  const [showTranslation, setShowTranslation] = useState(false)

  function speak(text, onEnd) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text)
    u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.82
    u.onend = onEnd
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  function playAll() {
    if (playing) { window.speechSynthesis.cancel(); setPlaying(false); setCurrentSentence(-1); return }
    setPlaying(true)
    let idx = 0
    function next() {
      if (idx >= lesson.sentences.length) { setPlaying(false); setCurrentSentence(-1); return }
      setCurrentSentence(idx)
      speak(lesson.sentences[idx].text, () => { idx++; setTimeout(next, 500) })
    }
    next()
  }

  const q = lesson.questions.factual

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="text-center">
        <div className="font-kai text-7xl font-bold mb-2" style={{ color: lesson.color }}>{lesson.coverChar}</div>
        <h2 className="font-kai text-3xl font-bold mb-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{lesson.title}</h2>
        <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{lesson.author}</p>
      </div>

      <button
        onClick={playAll}
        className="mx-auto flex items-center gap-3 px-10 py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
        style={{
          background: playing ? '#FF4B4B' : lesson.color,
          boxShadow: playing ? '0 4px 0 #CC0000' : `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99`,
        }}
      >
        <span className="text-xl">{playing ? '⏹' : '▶'}</span>
        {playing ? '停止' : '听朗读'}
      </button>

      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
        {lesson.sentences.map((s, i) => (
          <div
            key={s.id}
            className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 transition-all"
            style={currentSentence === i ? { borderColor: lesson.color, borderWidth: 2, borderStyle: 'solid' } : {}}
          >
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <div className="flex-1">
                <p className="font-kai text-2xl leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{s.text}</p>
                {showTranslation && (
                  <p className="text-base mt-2 leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{s.translation}</p>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 items-center shrink-0">
                <button
                  onClick={() => { window.speechSynthesis.cancel(); const u=new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(s.text); u.lang='zh-CN'; u.rate=0.8; window.speechSynthesis.speak(u) }}
                  className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-lg transition-colors"
                  style={{ color: lesson.color }}
                >🔊</button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setStars(p => p.includes(s.id) ? p.filter(x=>x!==s.id) : [...p,s.id])}
                  className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xl transition-all"
                  style={{ opacity: stars.includes(s.id) ? 1 : 0.25, transform: stars.includes(s.id) ? 'scale(1.2)' : 'scale(1)' }}
                >⭐</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <button
        onClick={() => setShowTranslation(v => !v)}
        className="text-base text-center py-3 rounded-2xl transition-all"
        style={{ border: '1.5px dashed var(--text3)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}
      >
        {showTranslation ? '收起译文 ↑' : '查看译文 ↓'}
      </button>

      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
        <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold mb-4" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>💬 {q.question}</p>
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2.5">
          {q.options.map((opt, i) => (
            <button
              key={i}
              onClick={() => setAnswered(i)}
              className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base font-medium transition-all"
              style={
                answered === null
                  ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                  : answered === i && i === q.answer
                  ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                  : answered === i
                  ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                  : i === q.answer && answered !== null
                  ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                  : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
              }
            >
              {answered !== null && i === q.answer ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        {answered !== null && (
          <p className="text-base mt-3 pt-3 leading-relaxed" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{q.explanation}</p>
        )}
      </div>

      {answered !== null && (
        <button
          onClick={onComplete}
          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg animate-pop transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
          style={{ background: lesson.color, boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99` }}
        >
          继续 →
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

### Stage2Learn, Stage3Read, Stage4Think, Stage5Write
Apply the same style changes to all remaining stage files:
- `bg-white rounded-2xl` → `glass rounded-2xl`
- Hardcoded color strings replaced with CSS variable style props
- Font sizes increased (text-base → larger, font-kai text-xl → text-2xl, etc.)

- `bg-gray-50/100` → `var(--bg2)`

- `text-ink` → `var(--text)`

Rewrite Stage2Learn.jsx:
```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Stage2Learn({ lesson, onComplete }) {
  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
  const [showMeaning, setShowMeaning] = useState(false)
  const [showWrite, setShowWrite] = useState(false)

  const vocab = lesson.vocabulary
  const current = vocab[idx]
  const isLast = idx === vocab.length - 1

  function next() {
    setShowMeaning(false); setShowWrite(false)
    if (isLast) onComplete()
    else setIdx(i => i + 1)
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        {vocab.map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="flex-1 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-all"
            style={{ background: i < idx ? '#58CC02' : i === idx ? lesson.color : 'var(--bg2)' }} />
        ))}
        <span className="text-sm shrink-0 ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{idx + 1}/{vocab.length}</span>
      </div>

      <div className="text-center">
        <button
          className="glass inline-flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-52 h-52 rounded-3xl mx-auto active:scale-95 transition-all shadow-lg"
          onClick={() => {
            setShowMeaning(true)
            const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(current.char); u.lang = 'zh-CN'; window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
          }}
        >
          <div className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 96, color: 'var(--text)', lineHeight: 1 }}>{current.char}</div>
          <div className="text-base mt-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{!showMeaning ? '点击听读音 👆' : current.pinyin}</div>
        </button>
      </div>

      {showMeaning && (
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 animate-pop">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-3">
            <span className="text-5xl">{current.emoji}</span>
            <div>
              <div className="font-kai text-3xl font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{current.char}</div>
              <div className="text-lg font-medium" style={{ color: lesson.color }}>{current.pinyin}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p className="text-lg font-medium mb-3" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{current.meaning}</p>
          <div className="rounded-xl px-4 py-3" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
            <p className="text-sm mb-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>课文中出现：</p>
            <p className="font-kai text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>
              {current.exampleInText.split(current.char).flatMap((part, i, arr) =>
                i < arr.length - 1
                  ? [part, <span key={i} style={{ color: lesson.color, fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{current.char}</span>]
                  : [part]
              )}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {showMeaning && !showWrite && (
        <button
          onClick={() => setShowWrite(true)}
          className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3.5 rounded-2xl text-base font-medium transition-all"
          style={{ border: `2px dashed ${lesson.color}`, color: lesson.color }}
        >✍️ 用 Pencil 写一写「{current.char}」</button>
      )}

      {showWrite && (
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 animate-pop">
          <p className="text-sm text-center mb-3" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>写一遍「{current.char}」，感受笔画</p>
          <WritingCanvas templateChar={current.char} height={200} showTemplate showGrid />
        </div>
      )}

      {showMeaning && (
        <button
          onClick={next}
          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
          style={{ background: lesson.color, boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99` }}
        >
          {isLast ? '全认识了！✓' : '下一个 →'}
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

Rewrite Stage3Read.jsx:
```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'

export default function Stage3Read({ lesson, onComplete }) {
  const [markedBreaks, setMarkedBreaks] = useState({})
  const [revealed, setRevealed] = useState([])

  function toggleBreak(sentId, charIdx) {
    setMarkedBreaks(prev => {
      const cur = prev[sentId] || []
      return { ...prev, [sentId]: cur.includes(charIdx) ? cur.filter(x=>x!==charIdx) : [...cur, charIdx] }
    })
  }

  function speak(text) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text); u.lang='zh-CN'; u.rate=0.8; window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
        <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold mb-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>📍 断句练习</p>
        <p className="text-base leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>点击两字之间的竖线，标出停顿的地方，再对比正确答案。</p>
      </div>

      {lesson.sentences.map(s => {
        const breaks = markedBreaks[s.id] || []
        const isRevealed = revealed.includes(s.id)
        const chars = s.text.split('')
        return (
          <div key={s.id} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-0 mb-4">
              {chars.map((ch, i) => (
                <span key={i} className="flex items-center">
                  <span className="font-kai text-2xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{ch}</span>
                  {i < chars.length - 1 && ch !== '，' && ch !== '。' && ch !== '"' && ch !== '"' && (
                    <button
                      onClick={() => !isRevealed && toggleBreak(s.id, i)}
                      className="w-4 h-7 flex items-center justify-center text-xl transition-all"
                      style={{
                        color: isRevealed
                          ? s.breakPoints.includes(i) ? '#58CC02' : 'var(--bg2)'
                          : breaks.includes(i) ? lesson.color : 'var(--text3)',
                        opacity: isRevealed && !s.breakPoints.includes(i) ? 0.2 : 1,
                      }}
                    >|</button>
                  )}
                </span>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
              <button
                onClick={() => speak(s.text)}
                className="glass flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium"
                style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}
              >🔊 听朗读</button>
              {!isRevealed && (
                <button
                  onClick={() => setRevealed(p => [...p, s.id])}
                  className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white"
                  style={{ background: lesson.color }}
                >查看参考</button>
              )}
            </div>
            {isRevealed && (
              <p className="text-base mt-3 pt-3 leading-relaxed" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{s.translation}</p>
            )}
          </div>
        )
      })}

      <button
        onClick={onComplete}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
        style={{ background: lesson.color, boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99` }}
      >我读懂了 →</button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

Rewrite Stage4Think.jsx:
```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Stage4Think({ lesson, onComplete }) {
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [answered, setAnswered] = useState(null)
  const [showCanvas, setShowCanvas] = useState(false)
  const [submitted, setSubmitted] = useState(false)
  const q = lesson.questions

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
      {step === 0 && (
        <>
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-5xl mb-2">🧠</div>
            <h3 className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold mb-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>读懂了吗？</h3>
            <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>先来一个小问题热热身</p>
          </div>
          <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
            <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold mb-4" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{q.factual.question}</p>
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2.5">
              {q.factual.options.map((opt, i) => (
                <button key={i} onClick={() => setAnswered(i)}
                  className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base font-medium transition-all"
                  style={
                    answered === null ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                    : answered === i && i === q.factual.answer ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                    : answered === i ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                    : i === q.factual.answer ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                    : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                  }
                >{answered !== null && i === q.factual.answer ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}</button>
              ))}
            </div>
            {answered !== null && (
              <p className="text-base mt-3 pt-3 leading-relaxed" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{q.factual.explanation}</p>
            )}
          </div>
          {answered !== null && (
            <button onClick={() => setStep(1)}
              className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg animate-pop transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
              style={{ background: lesson.color, boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99` }}
            >继续 →</button>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      {step === 1 && (
        <>
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-5xl mb-2">💭</div>
            <h3 className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold mb-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>说说你的想法</h3>
            <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>没有对错，说真实的想法</p>
          </div>
          <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
            <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold leading-relaxed mb-4" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{q.openEnded}</p>
            {!showCanvas ? (
              <button onClick={() => setShowCanvas(true)}
                className="w-full py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base font-medium transition-all"
                style={{ border: `2px dashed ${lesson.color}`, color: lesson.color }}
              >✍️ 用 Pencil 写下你的想法</button>
            ) : (
              <div className="animate-pop">
                <p className="text-sm mb-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>写几个字就好</p>
                <WritingCanvas height={200} />
                {!submitted && (
                  <button onClick={() => setSubmitted(true)}
                    className="mt-3 w-full py-3 rounded-xl text-white text-base font-semibold"
                    style={{ background: lesson.color }}
                  >写好了 ✓</button>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {submitted && (
            <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 animate-pop" style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #FFD900' }}>
              <p className="text-sm font-bold mb-1.5" style={{ color: '#E9A825' }}>👨‍👩‍👧 家长参考</p>
              <p className="text-base leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{q.parentPrompt}</p>
            </div>
          )}

          {submitted && (
            <button onClick={onComplete}
              className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg animate-pop transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
              style={{ background: lesson.color, boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99` }}
            >去写字 →</button>
          )}
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

Rewrite Stage5Write.jsx:
```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

const STEPS = [
  { id: '看', desc: '观察字形结构', icon: '👁' },
  { id: '描', desc: '描红感受笔画', icon: '🖊' },
  { id: '写', desc: '临写练习', icon: '✍️' },
  { id: '默', desc: '默写挑战', icon: '🏆' },
]

export default function Stage5Write({ lesson, onComplete }) {
  const chars = lesson.writingChars
  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [done, setDone] = useState([])

  const currentChar = chars[charIdx]
  const isLastChar = charIdx === chars.length - 1
  const isLastStep = step === STEPS.length - 1

  function nextStep() {
    if (!isLastStep) { setStep(s => s + 1); return }
    setDone(p => [...p, charIdx])
    if (!isLastChar) { setCharIdx(i => i + 1); setStep(0) }
    else onComplete()
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="text-center">
        <div className="text-4xl mb-1">✍️</div>
        <h3 className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold mb-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>书写练习</h3>
        <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>认真写，感受每一笔</p>
      </div>

      {/* Char selector */}
      <div className="flex gap-3 justify-center">
        {chars.map((ch, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setStep(0) }}
            className="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl font-kai text-3xl font-bold transition-all"
            style={
              i === charIdx ? { background: lesson.color, color: 'white', boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99`, transform: 'scale(1.05)' }
              : done.includes(i) ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
              : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
            }
          >{done.includes(i) ? '✓' : ch}</button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Step tabs */}
      <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
        {STEPS.map((s, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => i <= step && setStep(i)}
            className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-base font-bold transition-all"
            style={
              i === step ? { background: lesson.color, color: 'white', boxShadow: `0 2px 8px ${lesson.color}66` }
              : i < step ? { color: '#58CC02' }
              : { color: 'var(--text3)' }
            }
          >{s.icon} {s.id}</button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Step content */}
      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-6 min-h-64">
        {step === 0 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>观察字形，注意结构和笔画</p>
            <div className="w-52 h-52 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai font-bold"
              style={{ fontSize: 120, color: lesson.color, background: 'var(--bg2)', lineHeight: 1 }}>
              {currentChar}
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>仔细看清楚了再继续</p>
          </div>
        )}
        {step === 1 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-base text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>沿着淡色字描红</p>
            <WritingCanvas templateChar={currentChar} height={240} showTemplate showGrid />
          </div>
        )}
        {step === 2 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-base text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>参考旁边的字，自己写一遍</p>
            <div className="flex gap-3 items-start">
              <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai font-bold shrink-0"
                style={{ fontSize: 48, color: lesson.color, background: 'var(--bg2)', opacity: 0.5, lineHeight: 1 }}>
                {currentChar}
              </div>
              <WritingCanvas height={160} showGrid />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
        {step === 3 && (
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
            <p className="text-base text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>凭记忆写，不看范字 💪</p>
            <WritingCanvas height={240} showGrid />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <button onClick={nextStep}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
        style={{ background: lesson.color, boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99` }}
      >
        {isLastStep && isLastChar ? '完成！🎉' : isLastStep ? '下一个字 →' : `${STEPS[step + 1].id} →`}
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

Rewrite CompletionPage.jsx:
```jsx
export default function CompletionPage({ lesson, onBack }) {
  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-6 py-20 flex flex-col items-center gap-8 text-center">
      <div className="text-7xl animate-float">🎉</div>
      <div>
        <h2 className="font-kai text-4xl font-bold mb-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>太棒了！</h2>
        <p className="font-kai text-2xl" style={{ color: lesson.color }}>{lesson.completionMessage}</p>
      </div>
      <div className="glass w-full rounded-3xl p-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <p className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>今天的收获</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          {[
            { emoji: '👂', label: '听读原文' },
            { emoji: '📚', label: `${lesson.vocabulary.length}个新字词` },
            { emoji: '📖', label: '断句练习' },
            { emoji: '💭', label: '写下了想法' },
            { emoji: '✍️', label: lesson.writingChars.join('、') },
          ].map((item, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl p-3.5 flex items-center gap-2.5">
              <span className="text-2xl">{item.emoji}</span>
              <span className="text-base font-medium" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{item.label}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
      <button onClick={onBack}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-xl transition-all active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1"
        style={{ background: lesson.color, boxShadow: `0 4px 0 ${lesson.color}99` }}
      >返回课程 →</button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```text
    15→
    16→export default function LessonPage({ lesson, lessonProgress, onStageComplete, onComplete, onBack }) {
    17→  const firstIncomplete = STAGES.findIndex(s => !lessonProgress[s.id])
    18→  const [activeStage, setActiveStage] = useState(firstIncomplete >= 0 ? firstIncomplete : 0)
    19→
    20→  function handleStageComplete() {
    21→    const stageId = STAGES[activeStage].id
    22→    onStageComplete(stageId)
    23→    if (activeStage < STAGES.length - 1) {
    24→      setTimeout(() => setActiveStage(s => s + 1), 600)
    25→    } else {
    26→      setTimeout(onComplete, 800)
    27→    }
    28→  }
    29→
    30→  const stageProps = { lesson, onComplete: handleStageComplete }
    31→
    32→  return (
    33→    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
    34→      {/* Top bar */}
    35→      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-4 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur border-b border-gray-100 sticky top-0 z-10">
    36→        <button onClick={onBack} className="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gray-100 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors">
    37→          ←
    38→        </button>
    39→        <div className="flex-1">
    40→          <div className="font-kai font-bold text-ink text-base">{lesson.title}</div>
    41→        </div>
    42→        {/* Stage pills */}
    43→        <div className="flex gap-1">
    44→          {STAGES.map((s, i) => (
    45→            <button
    46→              key={s.id}
    47→              onClick={() => setActiveStage(i)}
    48→              className={`flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium transition-all ${
    49→                i === activeStage
    50→                  ? 'text-white shadow-sm'
    51→                  : lessonProgress[s.id]
    52→                  ? 'bg-green-light text-green-DEFAULT'
    53→                  : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-400'
    54→              }`}
    55→              style={i === activeStage ? { background: lesson.color } : lessonProgress[s.id] ? { background: '#EDFAF3', color: '#52B788' } : {}}
    56→            >
    57→              <span>{s.emoji}</span>
    58→              <span className="hidden sm:inline">{s.label}</span>
    59→            </button>
    60→          ))}
    61→        </div>
    62→      </div>
    63→
    64→      {/* Stage content */}
    65→      <div className="flex-1">
    66→        {activeStage === 0 && <Stage1Listen {...stageProps} />}
    67→        {activeStage === 1 && <Stage2Learn {...stageProps} />}
    68→        {activeStage === 2 && <Stage3Read {...stageProps} />}
    69→        {activeStage === 3 && <Stage4Think {...stageProps} />}
    70→        {activeStage === 4 && <Stage5Write {...stageProps} />}
    71→      </div>
    72→    </div>
    73→  )
    74→}
    75→
```

```text
     1→import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export default function WritingCanvas({
     4→  templateChar = '',
     5→  color = '#4A7FD4',
     6→  height = 200,
     7→  showTemplate = false,
     8→  showGrid = false,
     9→  className = '',
    10→}) {
    11→  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
    12→  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
    13→  const drawing = useRef(false)
    14→  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
    15→  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
    16→
    17→  function drawBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    18→    // Grid
    19→    if (showGrid) {
    20→      ctx.strokeStyle = '#e0e0e0'
    21→      ctx.lineWidth = 0.5
    22→      ctx.setLineDash([])
    23→      ctx.strokeRect(1, 1, w - 2, h - 2)
    24→      ctx.beginPath()
    25→      ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 1); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 1)
    26→      ctx.moveTo(1, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 1, h / 2)
    27→      ctx.setLineDash([4, 4])
    28→      ctx.stroke()
    29→      ctx.setLineDash([])
    30→    }
    31→    // Template character
    32→    if (showTemplate && templateChar) {
    33→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.75}px "Kaiti SC", serif`
    34→      ctx.fillStyle = color + '20'
    35→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    36→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    37→      ctx.fillText(templateChar, w / 2, h / 2)
    38→    }
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  useEffect(() => {
    42→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    43→    if (!canvas) return
    44→    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    45→    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    46→    canvas.width = w * dpr
    47→    canvas.height = height * dpr
    48→    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    49→    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    50→    ctx.lineCap = 'round'
    51→    ctx.lineJoin = 'round'
    52→    ctxRef.current = ctx
    53→    drawBackground(ctx, w, height)
    54→  }, [height, showGrid, showTemplate, templateChar, color])
    55→
    56→  function getPos(e) {
    57→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    58→    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    59→    const touch = e.touches ? e.touches[0] : e
    60→    return {
    61→      x: (touch.clientX ?? e.clientX) - rect.left,
    62→      y: (touch.clientY ?? e.clientY) - rect.top,
    63→      pressure: e.pressure ?? 0.5,
    64→    }
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  const onPointerDown = useCallback(e => {
    68→    e.preventDefault()
    69→    drawing.current = true
    70→    const pos = getPos(e)
    71→    lastPoint.current = pos
    72→    setHasDrawing(true)
    73→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    74→    ctx.beginPath()
    75→    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, (pos.pressure * 2 + 0.5), 0, Math.PI * 2)
    76→    ctx.fillStyle = color
    77→    ctx.fill()
    78→  }, [color])
    79→
    80→  const onPointerMove = useCallback(e => {
    81→    if (!drawing.current || !lastPoint.current) return
    82→    e.preventDefault()
    83→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    84→    const pos = getPos(e)
    85→    const last = lastPoint.current
    86→    const lineWidth = pos.pressure * 4 + 1
    87→    ctx.beginPath()
    88→    ctx.moveTo(last.x, last.y)
    89→    const midX = (last.x + pos.x) / 2
    90→    const midY = (last.y + pos.y) / 2
    91→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(last.x, last.y, midX, midY)
    92→    ctx.strokeStyle = color
    93→    ctx.lineWidth = lineWidth
    94→    ctx.stroke()
    95→    lastPoint.current = pos
    96→  }, [color])
    97→
    98→  const onPointerUp = useCallback(() => {
    99→    drawing.current = false
   100→    lastPoint.current = null
   101→  }, [])
   102→
   103→  function clear() {
   104→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   105→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   106→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.offsetWidth, height)
   107→    drawBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, height)
   108→    setHasDrawing(false)
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  return (
   112→    <div className={`relative ${className}`} style={{ width: '100%' }}>
   113→      <canvas
   114→        ref={canvasRef}
   115→        style={{
   116→          width: '100%',
   117→          height,
   118→          borderRadius: 12,
   119→          background: '#FAFAFA',
   120→          border: '1.5px solid #E5E5E5',
   121→          cursor: 'crosshair',
   122→          display: 'block',
   123→          touchAction: 'none',
   124→        }}
   125→        onPointerDown={onPointerDown}
   126→        onPointerMove={onPointerMove}
   127→        onPointerUp={onPointerUp}
   128→        onPointerLeave={onPointerUp}
   129→      />
   130→      {hasDrawing && (
   131→        <button
   132→          onClick={clear}
   133→          className="absolute top-2 right-2 w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-white shadow text-sm flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 hover:text-red-400 transition-colors"
   134→        >✕</button>
   135→      )}
   136→    </div>
   137→  )
   138→}
   139→
```

```text
     1→import { useState, useRef } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export default function Stage1Listen({ lesson, onComplete }) {
     4→  const [playing, setPlaying] = useState(false)
     5→  const [currentSentence, setCurrentSentence] = useState(-1)
     6→  const [stars, setStars] = useState([])
     7→  const [answered, setAnswered] = useState(null)
     8→  const [showTranslation, setShowTranslation] = useState(false)
     9→
    10→  function speakText(text, onEnd) {
    11→    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    12→    const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text)
    13→    utter.lang = 'zh-CN'
    14→    utter.rate = 0.85
    15→    if (onEnd) utter.onend = onEnd
    16→    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utter)
    17→  }
    18→
    19→  function playAll() {
    20→    if (playing) {
    21→      window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    22→      setPlaying(false)
    23→      setCurrentSentence(-1)
    24→      return
    25→    }
    26→    setPlaying(true)
    27→    let idx = 0
    28→    function next() {
    29→      if (idx >= lesson.sentences.length) {
    30→        setPlaying(false)
    31→        setCurrentSentence(-1)
    32→        return
    33→      }
    34→      setCurrentSentence(idx)
    35→      speakText(lesson.sentences[idx].text, () => { idx++; setTimeout(next, 400) })
    36→    }
    37→    next()
    38→  }
    39→
    40→  function speakSentence(s, idx) {
    41→    setCurrentSentence(idx)
    42→    speakText(s.text, () => setCurrentSentence(-1))
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  function toggleStar(id) {
    46→    setStars(prev => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(x => x !== id) : [...prev, id])
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  const q = lesson.questions.factual
    50→  const canComplete = answered !== null
    51→
    52→  return (
    53→    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
    54→      {/* Title */}
    55→      <div className="text-center">
    56→        <div className="font-kai text-5xl font-bold mb-2" style={{ color: lesson.color }}>{lesson.coverChar}</div>
    57→        <h2 className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold text-ink">{lesson.title}</h2>
    58→        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">{lesson.author}</p>
    59→      </div>
    60→
    61→      {/* Play button */}
    62→      <button
    63→        onClick={playAll}
    64→        className="mx-auto flex items-center gap-3 px-8 py-3.5 rounded-2xl text-white font-semibold text-base shadow-md hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all"
    65→        style={{ background: playing ? '#EF4444' : lesson.color }}
    66→      >
    67→        <span className="text-xl">{playing ? '⏹' : '▶'}</span>
    68→        {playing ? '停止朗读' : '听朗读'}
    69→      </button>
    70→
    71→      {/* Sentences */}
    72→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
    73→        {lesson.sentences.map((s, i) => (
    74→          <div
    75→            key={s.id}
    76→            className={`rounded-2xl p-4 transition-all border-2`}
    77→            style={{
    78→              background: currentSentence === i ? lesson.bgLight : 'white',
    79→              borderColor: currentSentence === i ? lesson.color : 'transparent',
    80→              transform: currentSentence === i ? 'scale(1.01)' : 'scale(1)',
    81→              boxShadow: currentSentence === i ? '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' : 'none',
    82→            }}
    83→          >
    84→            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
    85→              <div className="flex-1">
    86→                <p className="font-kai text-xl text-ink leading-relaxed">{s.text}</p>
    87→                {showTranslation && (
    88→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1.5 leading-relaxed">{s.translation}</p>
    89→                )}
    90→              </div>
    91→              <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 items-center shrink-0">
    92→                <button
    93→                  onClick={() => speakSentence(s, i)}
    94→                  className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm transition-colors hover:bg-gray-100"
    95→                  style={{ color: lesson.color }}
    96→                >🔊</button>
    97→                <button
    98→                  onClick={() => toggleStar(s.id)}
    99→                  className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-lg transition-all ${stars.includes(s.id) ? 'scale-110' : 'opacity-30'}`}
   100→                >⭐</button>
   101→              </div>
   102→            </div>
   103→          </div>
   104→        ))}
   105→      </div>
   106→
   107→      {/* Show translation toggle */}
   108→      <button
   109→        onClick={() => setShowTranslation(v => !v)}
   110→        className="text-sm text-center py-2 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-gray-300 text-gray-400 hover:border-gray-400 transition-colors"
   111→      >
   112→        {showTranslation ? '收起译文' : '查看译文参考'}
   113→      </button>
   114→
   115→      {/* Question */}
   116→      <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm">
   117→        <p className="font-kai text-base font-semibold text-ink mb-4">💬 {q.question}</p>
   118→        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
   119→          {q.options.map((opt, i) => (
   120→            <button
   121→              key={i}
   122→              onClick={() => setAnswered(i)}
   123→              className={`text-left px-4 py-3 rounded-xl border-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
   124→                answered === null
   125→                  ? 'border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300 bg-gray-50'
   126→                  : answered === i && i === q.answer
   127→                  ? 'border-green-400 bg-green-50 text-green-700'
   128→                  : answered === i && i !== q.answer
   129→                  ? 'border-red-300 bg-red-50 text-red-500'
   130→                  : i === q.answer && answered !== null
   131→                  ? 'border-green-400 bg-green-50 text-green-700'
   132→                  : 'border-gray-100 bg-gray-50 text-gray-400'
   133→              }`}
   134→            >
   135→              {answered !== null && i === q.answer ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
   136→            </button>
   137→          ))}
   138→        </div>
   139→        {answered !== null && (
   140→          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-3 leading-relaxed">{q.explanation}</p>
   141→        )}
   142→      </div>
   143→
   144→      {/* Complete button */}
   145→      {canComplete && (
   146→        <button
   147→          onClick={onComplete}
   148→          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-all animate-pop"
   149→          style={{ background: lesson.color }}
   150→        >
   151→          继续 →
   152→        </button>
   153→      )}
   154→    </div>
   155→  )
   156→}
   157→
```

```text
     1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'
     3→
     4→export default function Stage2Learn({ lesson, onComplete }) {
     5→  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
     6→  const [showMeaning, setShowMeaning] = useState(false)
     7→  const [showWrite, setShowWrite] = useState(false)
     8→  const [learned, setLearned] = useState([])
     9→
    10→  const vocab = lesson.vocabulary
    11→  const current = vocab[idx]
    12→  const isLast = idx === vocab.length - 1
    13→
    14→  function next() {
    15→    setShowMeaning(false)
    16→    setShowWrite(false)
    17→    if (!learned.includes(idx)) setLearned(p => [...p, idx])
    18→    if (isLast) onComplete()
    19→    else setIdx(i => i + 1)
    20→  }
    21→
    22→  function speakChar() {
    23→    const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(current.char)
    24→    utter.lang = 'zh-CN'
    25→    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utter)
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  return (
    29→    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
    30→      {/* Progress */}
    31→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    32→        {vocab.map((_, i) => (
    33→          <div
    34→            key={i}
    35→            className="flex-1 h-2 rounded-full transition-all"
    36→            style={{
    37→              background: i < idx ? '#52B788' : i === idx ? lesson.color : '#E5E7EB'
    38→            }}
    39→          />
    40→        ))}
    41→        <span className="text-sm text-gray-400 shrink-0">{idx + 1}/{vocab.length}</span>
    42→      </div>
    43→
    44→      {/* Character card */}
    45→      <div className="text-center">
    46→        <div
    47→          className="inline-flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-48 h-48 rounded-3xl shadow-lg mx-auto cursor-pointer active:scale-95 transition-all"
    48→          style={{ background: lesson.bgLight, border: `3px solid ${lesson.color}33` }}
    49→          onClick={() => { setShowMeaning(true); speakChar() }}
    50→        >
    51→          <div className="font-kai text-8xl font-bold text-ink">{current.char}</div>
    52→          <div className="text-gray-400 text-sm mt-2">{!showMeaning ? '点击听读音' : current.pinyin}</div>
    53→        </div>
    54→      </div>
    55→
    56→      {/* Meaning card */}
    57→      {showMeaning && (
    58→        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm animate-pop">
    59→          <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-3">
    60→            <span className="text-4xl">{current.emoji}</span>
    61→            <div>
    62→              <div className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold text-ink">{current.char}</div>
    63→              <div className="text-base font-medium" style={{ color: lesson.color }}>{current.pinyin}</div>
    64→            </div>
    65→          </div>
    66→          <p className="text-ink font-medium text-base mb-2">{current.meaning}</p>
    67→          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5">
    68→            <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">课文中：</p>
    69→            <p className="font-kai text-base text-ink mt-0.5">
    70→              {current.exampleInText.split(current.char).map((part, i, arr) => (
    71→                <span key={i}>
    72→                  {part}
    73→                  {i < arr.length - 1 ? (
    74→                    <span style={{ color: lesson.color, fontWeight: 'bold' }}>{current.char}</span>
    75→                  ) : null}
    76→                </span>
    77→              ))}
    78→            </p>
    79→          </div>
    80→        </div>
    81→      )}
    82→
    83→      {/* Write it button */}
    84→      {showMeaning && !showWrite && (
    85→        <button
    86→          onClick={() => setShowWrite(true)}
    87→          className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3 rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed text-base font-medium transition-all"
    88→          style={{ borderColor: lesson.color, color: lesson.color }}
    89→        >
    90→          ✍️ 用 Pencil 写一写
    91→        </button>
    92→      )}
    93→
    94→      {/* Writing canvas */}

    98→          <WritingCanvas

   100→            color={lesson.color}
```

```text
     1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export default function Stage3Read({ lesson, onComplete }) {
     4→  const [markedBreaks, setMarkedBreaks] = useState({})
     5→  const [revealed, setRevealed] = useState([])
     6→
     7→  function toggleBreak(sentId, charIdx) {
     8→    setMarkedBreaks(prev => {
     9→      const current = prev[sentId] || []
    10→      const has = current.includes(charIdx)
    11→      return { ...prev, [sentId]: has ? current.filter(x => x !== charIdx) : [...current, charIdx] }
    12→    })
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  function revealBreaks(sentId) {
    16→    setRevealed(prev => [...prev, sentId])
    17→  }
    18→
    19→  function speak(text) {
    20→    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    21→    const utter = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text)
    22→    utter.lang = 'zh-CN'
    23→    utter.rate = 0.8
    24→    window.speechSynthesis.speak(utter)
    25→  }
    26→
    27→  return (
    28→    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
    29→      <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm">
    30→        <p className="font-kai text-base font-semibold text-ink mb-1">📍 断句练习</p>
    31→        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 leading-relaxed">读文言文要注意停顿。点击两个字之间的空隙，标出你认为该停顿的地方，再对比正确答案。</p>
    32→      </div>
    33→
    34→      {lesson.sentences.map(s => {
    35→        const breaks = markedBreaks[s.id] || []
    36→        const isRevealed = revealed.includes(s.id)
    37→        const chars = s.text.split('')
    38→
    39→        return (
    40→          <div key={s.id} className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm">
    41→            {/* Sentence with clickable gaps */}
    42→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-0 mb-4">
    43→              {chars.map((ch, i) => (
    44→                <span key={i} className="flex items-center">
    45→                  <span className="font-kai text-2xl text-ink">{ch}</span>
    46→                  {i < chars.length - 1 && ch !== '，' && ch !== '。' && ch !== '"' && ch !== '"' && (
    47→                    <button
    48→                      onClick={() => !isRevealed && toggleBreak(s.id, i)}
    49→                      className="w-4 h-6 flex items-center justify-center text-lg transition-all"
    50→                      style={{
    51→                        color: isRevealed
    52→                          ? s.breakPoints.includes(i) ? '#52B788' : '#E5E7EB'
    53→                          : breaks.includes(i)
    54→                          ? lesson.color
    55→                          : '#D1D5DB',
    56→                      }}
    57→                    >
    58→                      |
    59→                    </button>
    60→                  )}
    61→                </span>
    62→              ))}
    63→            </div>
    64→
    65→            <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
    66→              <button
    67→                onClick={() => speak(s.text)}
    68→                className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium bg-gray-50 text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100"
    69→              >🔊 听朗读</button>
    70→              {!isRevealed && (
    71→                <button
    72→                  onClick={() => revealBreaks(s.id)}
    73→                  className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium text-white"
    74→                  style={{ background: lesson.color }}
    75→                >查看参考断句</button>
    76→              )}
    77→            </div>
    78→
    79→            {isRevealed && (
    80→              <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-gray-100">
    81→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 leading-relaxed">{s.translation}</p>
    82→              </div>
    83→            )}
    84→          </div>
    85→        )
    86→      })}
    87→
    88→      <button
    89→        onClick={onComplete}
    90→        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-all"
    91→        style={{ background: lesson.color }}
    92→      >
    93→        我读懂了 →
    94→      </button>
    95→    </div>
    96→  )
    97→}
    98→
```

```text
     1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'
     3→
     4→const STEPS = ['看', '描', '写', '默']
     5→
     6→export default function Stage5Write({ lesson, onComplete }) {
     7→  const chars = lesson.writingChars
     8→  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
     9→  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
    10→  const [done, setDone] = useState([])
    11→
    12→  const currentChar = chars[charIdx]
    13→  const isLastChar = charIdx === chars.length - 1
    14→  const isLastStep = step === STEPS.length - 1
    15→
    16→  function nextStep() {
    17→    if (!isLastStep) {
    18→      setStep(s => s + 1)
    19→      return
    20→    }
    21→    setDone(p => [...p, charIdx])
    22→    if (!isLastChar) {
    23→      setCharIdx(i => i + 1)
    24→      setStep(0)
    25→    } else {
    26→      onComplete()
    27→    }
    28→  }
    29→
    30→  return (
    31→    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-6">
    32→      {/* Header */}
    33→      <div className="text-center">
    34→        <div className="text-3xl mb-1">✍️</div>
    35→        <h3 className="font-kai text-xl font-bold text-ink">书写练习</h3>
    36→        <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 mt-0.5">用 Apple Pencil，认真写</p>
    37→      </div>
    38→
    39→      {/* Char selector */}
    40→      <div className="flex gap-3 justify-center">
    41→        {chars.map((ch, i) => (
    42→          <button
    43→            key={i}
    44→            onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setStep(0) }}
    45→            className="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
    46→            style={
    47→              i === charIdx
    48→                ? { background: lesson.color, color: 'white', transform: 'scale(1.05)', boxShadow: '0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)' }
    49→                : done.includes(i)
    50→                ? { background: '#EDFAF3', color: '#52B788' }
    51→                : { background: '#F3F4F6', color: '#9CA3AF' }
    52→            }
    53→          >
    54→            {done.includes(i) ? '✓' : ch}
    55→          </button>
    56→        ))}
    57→      </div>
    58→
    59→      {/* Step tabs */}
    60→      <div className="flex rounded-2xl bg-gray-100 p-1 gap-1">
    61→        {STEPS.map((s, i) => (
    62→          <button
    63→            key={i}
    64→            onClick={() => i <= step && setStep(i)}
    65→            className="flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"
    66→            style={
    67→              i === step
    68→                ? { background: lesson.color, color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)' }
    69→                : i < step
    70→                ? { color: '#9CA3AF' }
    71→                : { color: '#D1D5DB' }
    72→            }
    73→          >
    74→            {s}
    75→          </button>
    76→        ))}
    77→      </div>
    78→
    79→      {/* Step content */}
    80→      <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm" style={{ minHeight: 260 }}>
    81→        {step === 0 && (
    82→          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 animate-pop">
    83→            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400">观察字的结构，注意笔画顺序</p>
    84→            <div
    85→              className="w-48 h-48 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai text-8xl font-bold border-4"
    86→              style={{ color: lesson.color, borderColor: lesson.bgLight, background: lesson.bgLight }}
    87→            >
    88→              {currentChar}
    89→            </div>
    90→            <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">仔细看清楚了再继续</p>
    91→          </div>
    92→        )}
    93→        {step === 1 && (
    94→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
    95→            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">用 Pencil 描红，感受每一笔</p>
    96→            <WritingCanvas templateChar={currentChar} color={lesson.color} height={220} showTemplate showGrid />
    97→          </div>
    98→        )}
    99→        {step === 2 && (
   100→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
   101→            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">旁边有范字，自己临写一遍</p>
   102→            <div className="flex gap-3 items-start">
   103→              <div
   104→                className="w-20 h-20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai text-4xl font-bold shrink-0 border"
   105→                style={{ color: lesson.color, opacity: 0.4, borderColor: lesson.bgLight, background: lesson.bgLight }}
   106→              >
   107→                {currentChar}
   108→              </div>
   109→              <div className="flex-1">
   110→                <WritingCanvas color={lesson.color} height={160} showGrid />
   111→              </div>
   112→            </div>
   113→          </div>
   114→        )}
   115→        {step === 3 && (
   116→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
   117→            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center">凭记忆写，不看范字</p>
   118→            <WritingCanvas color={lesson.color} height={220} showGrid />
   119→          </div>
   120→        )}
   121→      </div>
   122→
   123→      <button
   124→        onClick={nextStep}
   125→        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-all"
   126→        style={{ background: lesson.color }}
   127→      >
   128→        {isLastStep && isLastChar ? '完成！🎉' : isLastStep ? '下一个字 →' : `${STEPS[step + 1]} →`}
   129→      </button>
   130→    </div>
   131→  )
   132→}
   133→
```
