## 8. Create `src/components/exercises/Ex6Calligraphy.jsx`

This is the most important one. Large character, size slider, brush writing:

```jsx
import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
import { calligraphyChars } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'

export default function Ex6Calligraphy({ onComplete }) {
  const { penColor, darkMode } = useApp()
  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
  const [charSize, setCharSize] = useState(200) // px
  const [mode, setMode] = useState('watch') // watch | trace | free
  const [practiced, setPracticed] = useState([])
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
  const drawing = useRef(false)
  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)

  const current = calligraphyChars[charIdx]

  // Init canvas
  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    const h = canvas.offsetHeight
    canvas.width = w * dpr
    canvas.height = h * dpr
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    ctxRef.current = ctx
    clearCanvas(ctx, w, h)
  }, [mode, charIdx, darkMode, charSize])

  function clearCanvas(ctx, w, h) {
    if (!ctx) return
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    const bg = darkMode ? 'rgba(20,22,32,0.7)' : 'rgba(250,248,244,0.9)'
    ctx.fillStyle = bg
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)
    drawGrid(ctx, w, h)
    if (mode === 'trace') drawTemplate(ctx, w, h)
  }

  function drawGrid(ctx, w, h) {
    const gc = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.07)'
    ctx.strokeStyle = gc
    ctx.lineWidth = 1
    // Outer rect
    ctx.strokeRect(4, 4, w - 8, h - 8)
    // Cross
    ctx.setLineDash([6, 6])
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 4); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(4, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h / 2)
    ctx.stroke()
    ctx.setLineDash([])
    // Diagonals
    ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(4, 4); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(w - 4, 4); ctx.lineTo(4, h - 4)
    ctx.stroke()
  }

  function drawTemplate(ctx, w, h) {
    // Draw faint character as template
    ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.78}px "Kaiti SC", "STKaiti", serif`
    ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    ctx.fillText(current.char, w / 2, h / 2)
  }

  function getBrushWidth(pressure, velocity) {
    const min = 2, max = 28
    const p = pressure > 0 ? Math.max(0.15, pressure) : 0.55
    const vFactor = Math.max(0.1, 1 - velocity * 0.07)
    return min + (max - min) * p * vFactor
  }

  function getPos(e) {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    return { x: e.clientX - rect.left, y: e.clientY - rect.top, pressure: e.pressure ?? 0.5 }
  }

  const onPointerDown = useCallback(e => {
    e.preventDefault()
    canvasRef.current.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    drawing.current = true
    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    const pos = getPos(e)
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0) }
    setHasDrawing(true)
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0) / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = penColor
    ctx.fill()
  }, [penColor])

  const onPointerMove = useCallback(e => {
    if (!drawing.current || !lastPoint.current) return
    e.preventDefault()
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    const now = Date.now()
    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    const pos = getPos(e)
    const last = lastPoint.current
    const dx = pos.x - last.x, dy = pos.y - last.y
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy)
    const velocity = dist / dt
    const w2 = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, velocity)
    const w1 = last.width || w2
    const len = dist
    if (len > 0.3) {
      const nx = -dy / len, ny = dx / len
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(last.x + nx * w1 / 2, last.y + ny * w1 / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(pos.x + nx * w2 / 2, pos.y + ny * w2 / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(pos.x - nx * w2 / 2, pos.y - ny * w2 / 2)
      ctx.lineTo(last.x - nx * w1 / 2, last.y - ny * w1 / 2)
      ctx.closePath()
      ctx.fillStyle = penColor
      ctx.fill()
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
      ctx.fill()
    }
    lastTime.current = now
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: w2 }
  }, [penColor])

  const onPointerUp = useCallback(() => { drawing.current = false; lastPoint.current = null }, [])

  function clear() {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    clearCanvas(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, canvas.offsetHeight)
    setHasDrawing(false)
  }

  function markPracticed() {
    if (!practiced.includes(charIdx)) setPracticed(p => [...p, charIdx])
    if (charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1) { setCharIdx(i => i + 1); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false) }
    else onComplete()
  }

  // Canvas height = charSize + 40 for padding, min 220
  const canvasH = Math.max(240, charSize + 60)

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col gap-5" style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      {/* Character selector strip */}
      <div className="px-5 pt-4 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-1">
        {calligraphyChars.map((c, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false) }}
            className="shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
            style={i === charIdx
              ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 3px 0 #B07A00', transform: 'scale(1.05)' }
              : practiced.includes(i)
              ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
              : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
            }>{practiced.includes(i) ? '✓' : c.char}</button>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="px-5 flex flex-col gap-4">
        {/* Character info */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <div className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 52, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1 }}>{current.char}</div>
          <div>
            <div className="text-xl font-medium" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{current.pinyin}</div>
            <div className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{current.meaning}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex-1" />
          <div className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{practiced.length}/{calligraphyChars.length}</div>
        </div>

        {/* Reference character — BIG */}
        {mode === 'watch' && (
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pop"
            style={{ height: charSize + 40, background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
            <div className="font-kai font-bold select-none" style={{ fontSize: charSize, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1, fontFamily: '"Kaiti SC", "STKaiti", serif' }}>
              {current.char}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Size slider */}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl px-5 py-4 flex items-center gap-4">
          <span className="font-kai text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)', fontSize: 20 }}>小</span>
          <input type="range" min="100" max="320" value={charSize}
            onChange={e => setCharSize(Number(e.target.value))}
            className="flex-1 h-2 rounded-full appearance-none cursor-pointer"
            style={{ accentColor: '#E9A825' }} />
          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)', fontSize: 28 }}>大</span>
          <span className="text-sm ml-2 w-12 text-right" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{charSize}px</span>
        </div>

        {/* Mode tabs */}
        <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
          {[['watch','👁 看', '观察字形'], ['trace','🖊 描', '描红练习'], ['free','✍️ 写', '独立书写']].map(([m, label, tip]) => (
            <button key={m} onClick={() => { setMode(m); setHasDrawing(false) }}
              className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5"
              style={mode === m ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
              <span>{label}</span>
              <span className="text-xs font-normal opacity-70">{tip}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Canvas for trace/free */}
        {(mode === 'trace' || mode === 'free') && (
          <div className="relative animate-pop" style={{ borderRadius: 20, overflow: 'hidden' }}>
            <canvas ref={canvasRef}
              style={{ width: '100%', height: canvasH, display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', borderRadius: 20, border: '2px solid var(--card-border)', cursor: 'crosshair' }}
              onPointerDown={onPointerDown}
              onPointerMove={onPointerMove}
              onPointerUp={onPointerUp}
              onPointerLeave={onPointerUp}
              onPointerCancel={onPointerUp}
            />
            {hasDrawing && (
              <button onClick={clear}
                className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm shadow-lg"
                style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>✕</button>
            )}
            {mode === 'trace' && (
              <div className="absolute bottom-3 left-3 text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-lg" style={{ background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', color: 'white' }}>
                描红模式 · 淡字处书写
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Action buttons */}
        <div className="flex gap-3 pb-6">
          <button onClick={markPracticed}
            className="flex-1 py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
            style={{ background: '#E9A825', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #B07A00' }}>
            {charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1 ? `写好了，下一字 →` : '完成书写关 🎉'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

### FILE 2: `src/components/ExerciseHub.jsx`

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { exercises } from '../data/exercises'
import Ex1Words from './exercises/Ex1Words'
import Ex2Meaning from './exercises/Ex2Meaning'
import Ex3Pause from './exercises/Ex3Pause'
import Ex4Comprehension from './exercises/Ex4Comprehension'
import Ex5Reading from './exercises/Ex5Reading'
import Ex6Calligraphy from './exercises/Ex6Calligraphy'

const COMPS = {
  words: Ex1Words, meaning: Ex2Meaning, pause: Ex3Pause,
  comprehension: Ex4Comprehension, reading: Ex5Reading, calligraphy: Ex6Calligraphy,
}

export default function ExerciseHub({ onBack }) {
  const [active, setActive] = useState(null)
  const [done, setDone] = useState([])

  if (active) {
    const Comp = COMPS[active.id]
    return (
      <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
        <div className="glass-strong sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 pl-16">
          <button onClick={() => setActive(null)} className="glass w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>←</button>
          <span className="text-2xl">{active.emoji}</span>
          <span className="font-kai font-bold text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{active.title}</span>
          <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{active.desc}</span>
        </div>
        <Comp onComplete={() => { setDone(p => [...new Set([...p, active.id])]); setActive(null) }} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      <div className="glass-strong sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 pl-16">
        <button onClick={onBack} className="glass w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>←</button>
        <span className="font-kai font-bold text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>练习园</span>
        <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{done.length}/6 完成</span>
      </div>

      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <p className="text-base text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>文言文二则 · 全套练习</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          {exercises.map(ex => {
            const isDone = done.includes(ex.id)
            return (
              <button key={ex.id} onClick={() => setActive(ex)}
                className="glass rounded-3xl p-5 text-left active:scale-95 transition-all flex flex-col gap-3"
                style={{ borderTop: `3px solid ${ex.color}` }}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <span className="text-3xl">{ex.emoji}</span>
                  {isDone
                    ? <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>✓ 完成</span>
                    : <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>待完成</span>}
                </div>
                <div>
                  <div className="font-kai text-xl font-bold mb-0.5" style={{ color: ex.color }}>{ex.title}</div>
                  <div className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{ex.desc}</div>
                </div>
              </button>
            )
          })}
        </div>
        {done.length === 6 && (
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl p-6 text-center animate-pop">
            <div className="text-5xl mb-3">🏆</div>
            <p className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>全部完成！</p>
            <p className="text-base mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>你已掌握本课所有练习</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

### FILE 3: `src/components/exercises/Ex1Words.jsx`

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { wordsData } from '../../data/exercises'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Ex1Words({ onComplete }) {
  const [section, setSection] = useState(0)
  const [pronAnswers, setPronAnswers] = useState({})
  const [gwIdx, setGwIdx] = useState(0)

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
        {['字音辨析', '组词练习', '拼音写词'].map((s, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => setSection(i)}
            className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"
            style={section === i ? { background: '#1CB0F6', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
            {s}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {section === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>判断读音是否正确，错的写出正确读音</p>
          {wordsData.pronunciation.map((item, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                <span className="font-kai text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{item.sentence}</span>
                <span className="text-sm px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: '#1CB0F6' }}>标注：{item.given}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex gap-3 items-center">
                <button onClick={() => setPronAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [i]: 'correct' }))}
                  className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-base transition-all"
                  style={pronAnswers[i] === 'correct' ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' } : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }}>
                  ✓ 正确
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => setPronAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [i]: 'wrong' }))}
                  className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-base transition-all"
                  style={pronAnswers[i] === 'wrong' ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' } : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }}>
                  ✗ 有误
                </button>
              </div>
              {pronAnswers[i] && (
                <div className="mt-2 text-sm animate-pop" style={{ color: item.correct ? '#58CC02' : '#FF4B4B' }}>
                  {item.correct ? '✓ 读音正确！' : `✗ 正确读音是：${item.pinyin}`}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {section === 1 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>用 Pencil 给下列汉字组词</p>
          <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap justify-center">
            {wordsData.groupWords.map((item, i) => (
              <button key={i} onClick={() => setGwIdx(i)}
                className="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
                style={gwIdx === i ? { background: '#1CB0F6', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 3px 0 #0091D4' } : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
                {item.char}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div key={gwIdx} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 animate-pop flex flex-col gap-3">
            <div className="text-center font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 72, color: '#1CB0F6', lineHeight: 1 }}>
              {wordsData.groupWords[gwIdx].char}
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>用 Pencil 写出两个词语</p>
            <WritingCanvas height={130} showGrid />
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 pt-2" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)' }}>
              <span className="text-xs" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>参考：</span>
              {wordsData.groupWords[gwIdx].examples.map(e => (
                <span key={e} className="text-sm px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{e}</span>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {section === 2 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>看拼音，用 Pencil 写汉字词语</p>
          {wordsData.pinyin.map((item, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
              <div className="text-lg font-medium text-center py-1 tracking-wider" style={{ color: '#1CB0F6' }}>{item.py}</div>
              <WritingCanvas height={90} showGrid />
              <details>
                <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>查看答案</summary>
                <span className="font-kai text-base ml-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{item.answer}</span>
              </details>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      <button onClick={onComplete}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
        style={{ background: '#1CB0F6', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #0091D4' }}>
        完成字词关 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { meaningData } from '../../data/exercises'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Ex2Meaning({ onComplete }) {
  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
  const [revealed, setRevealed] = useState([])
  const group = meaningData[idx]

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
        {meaningData.map((_, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => setIdx(i)} className="flex-1 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-all"
            style={{ background: i === idx ? '#58CC02' : i < idx ? '#58CC0255' : 'var(--bg2)' }} />
        ))}
        <span className="text-sm shrink-0" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{idx + 1}/{meaningData.length}</span>
      </div>

      <span className="self-start text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-medium" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>{group.source}</span>

      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
        <p className="font-kai text-2xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{group.sentence}</p>
      </div>

      <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>解释加点字词的意思（用 Pencil 写）</p>

      {group.items.map((item, i) => {
        const rid = `${idx}-${i}`
        return (
          <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <span className="font-kai text-4xl font-bold" style={{ color: '#58CC02' }}>{item.word}</span>
              <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>的意思是——</span>
            </div>
            <WritingCanvas height={80} showGrid />
            {!revealed.includes(rid) ? (
              <button onClick={() => setRevealed(p => [...p, rid])}
                className="text-sm py-2 rounded-xl transition-all"
                style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #58CC02', color: '#58CC02' }}>
                查看答案
              </button>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-base py-2 px-3 rounded-xl font-kai animate-pop" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>
                {item.hint}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )
      })}

      <div className="flex gap-3">
        {idx > 0 && (
          <button onClick={() => setIdx(i => i - 1)} className="flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-2xl font-bold text-base"
            style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>← 上一组</button>
        )}
        {idx < meaningData.length - 1 ? (
          <button onClick={() => setIdx(i => i + 1)} className="flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
            style={{ background: '#58CC02', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #46A302' }}>下一组 →</button>
        ) : (
          <button onClick={onComplete} className="flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
            style={{ background: '#58CC02', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #46A302' }}>完成字义关 ✓</button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { pauseData } from '../../data/exercises'

export default function Ex3Pause({ onComplete }) {
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState({})
  const allAnswered = pauseData.every((_, i) => answers[i] !== undefined)

  function speak(text) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text.replace(/\//g, '，'))
    u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.75
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
        <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>📍 断句与朗读节奏</p>
        <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>选出正确答案，点击选项可听朗读</p>
      </div>

      {pauseData.map((item, qi) => (
        <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {item.q}</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
            {item.options.map((opt, oi) => {
              const chosen = answers[qi] === oi
              const isCorrect = oi === item.answer
              const showResult = answers[qi] !== undefined
              return (
                <button key={oi}
                  onClick={() => { setAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [qi]: oi })); speak(opt) }}
                  className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all font-kai"
                  style={
                    !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                    : chosen && isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                    : chosen ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                    : isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                    : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                  }>
                  {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                  {!showResult && <span className="float-right">🔊</span>}
                </button>
              )
            })}
          </div>
          {answers[qi] !== undefined && (
            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-2 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
              💡 {item.explanation}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      ))}

      {allAnswered && (
        <button onClick={onComplete}
          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg animate-pop active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
          style={{ background: '#FF9600', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC7700' }}>
          完成断句关 →
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { comprehensionData } from '../../data/exercises'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Ex4Comprehension({ onComplete }) {
  const [tab, setTab] = useState(0)
  const [mcAnswers, setMcAnswers] = useState({})
  const [matchAnswers, setMatchAnswers] = useState({})
  const mc = comprehensionData.multiChoice

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
        {['选择题', '句子赏析'].map((t, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => setTab(i)}
            className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-base font-bold transition-all"
            style={tab === i ? { background: '#CE82FF', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
            {t}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {tab === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-5">
          {mc.map((item, qi) => (
            <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
              <p className="font-kai text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {item.q}</p>

              {item.type === 'multi-match' ? (
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
                    {item.meanings.map(m => (
                      <div key={m.id} className="text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded-xl" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{m.text}</div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  {item.sentences.map((s, si) => {
                    const key = `${qi}-${si}`
                    const chosen = matchAnswers[key]
                    const showResult = chosen !== undefined
                    return (
                      <div key={si} className="glass rounded-xl p-3 flex flex-col gap-2">
                        <p className="font-kai text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{s.text}</p>
                        <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                          {['a','b','c','d','e'].map(opt => (
                            <button key={opt}
                              onClick={() => setMatchAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [key]: opt }))}
                              className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"
                              style={
                                !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
                                : chosen === opt && opt === s.answer ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                                : chosen === opt ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                                : opt === s.answer && showResult ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
                                : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
                              }>{opt}</button>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )
                  })}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                  {item.options.map((opt, oi) => {
                    const chosen = mcAnswers[qi] === oi
                    const isCorrect = oi === item.answer
                    const showResult = mcAnswers[qi] !== undefined
                    return (
                      <button key={oi} onClick={() => setMcAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [qi]: oi }))}
                        className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all"
                        style={
                          !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                          : chosen && isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                          : chosen ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                          : isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                          : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                        }>
                        {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                      </button>
                    )
                  })}
                  {mcAnswers[qi] !== undefined && item.explanation && (
                    <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-2 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
                      💡 {item.explanation}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {tab === 1 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-5">
          {comprehensionData.sentenceAnalysis.map((block, bi) => (
            <div key={bi} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
              <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: '#CE82FF' }}>「{block.sentence}」</p>
              </div>
              {block.questions.map((q, qi) => (
                <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
                  <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{q.q}</p>
                  {q.type === 'choice' ? (
                    <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                      {q.options.map((opt, oi) => (
                        <div key={oi} className="px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-base"
                          style={{ background: oi === q.answer ? '#EEE4FF' : 'var(--bg2)', color: oi === q.answer ? '#9B30D0' : 'var(--text2)', border: oi === q.answer ? '2px solid #CE82FF' : '2px solid transparent' }}>
                          {oi === q.answer ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                        </div>
                      ))}
                      {q.explanation && <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>💡 {q.explanation}</p>}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <>
                      <WritingCanvas height={90} showGrid />
                      {q.blanks && (
                        <details>
                          <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: '#CE82FF' }}>查看参考答案</summary>
                          <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                            {q.blanks.map((b, i) => (
                              <span key={i} className="text-sm px-2 py-1 rounded-lg font-kai" style={{ background: '#EEE4FF', color: '#9B30D0' }}>{b}</span>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        </details>
                      )}
                    </>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      <button onClick={onComplete}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
        style={{ background: '#CE82FF', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #9B30D0' }}>
        完成理解关 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { readingData } from '../../data/exercises'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Ex5Reading({ onComplete }) {
  const [showTrans, setShowTrans] = useState([])

  function speak(text) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text); u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.8
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="text-center">
        <div className="text-4xl mb-2">🕯️</div>
        <h3 className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: '#FF4B4B' }}>凿壁偷光</h3>
        <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>课外拓展阅读</p>
      </div>

      {readingData.text.map(para => (
        <div key={para.id} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
            <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed flex-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{para.original}</p>
            <button onClick={() => speak(para.original)}
              className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 text-lg"
              style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>🔊</button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {para.notes.map((n, i) => (
              <span key={i} className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>📌 {n}</span>
            ))}
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => setShowTrans(p => p.includes(para.id) ? p.filter(x => x !== para.id) : [...p, para.id])}
            className="text-sm py-2 rounded-xl transition-all"
            style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #FF4B4B', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>
            {showTrans.includes(para.id) ? '收起译文 ↑' : '查看译文 ↓'}
          </button>
          {showTrans.includes(para.id) && (
            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed animate-slideUp" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{para.translation}</p>
          )}
        </div>
      ))}

      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <p className="font-kai text-lg font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>阅读练习</p>
        {readingData.questions.map((q, qi) => (
          <div key={qi} className="flex flex-col gap-2">
            <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {q.q}</p>
            <WritingCanvas height={q.type === 'open' ? 160 : 90} showGrid />
            {(q.answer || q.reference) && (
              <details>
                <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: '#FF4B4B' }}>查看参考答案</summary>
                <div className="mt-2 text-base px-3 py-2 rounded-xl font-kai" style={{ background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000' }}>
                  {q.reference || q.answer}
                </div>
              </details>
            )}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <button onClick={onComplete}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
        style={{ background: '#FF4B4B', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC0000' }}>
        完成拓展关 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

### FILE 8: `src/components/exercises/Ex6Calligraphy.jsx`

This is the key file. Large character display, size slider, 3 modes (watch/trace/free), brush canvas.

```jsx
import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
import { calligraphyChars } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'

export default function Ex6Calligraphy({ onComplete }) {
  const { penColor, darkMode } = useApp()
  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
  const [charSize, setCharSize] = useState(220)
  const [mode, setMode] = useState('watch')
  const [practiced, setPracticed] = useState([])
  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
  const drawing = useRef(false)
  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
  const current = calligraphyChars[charIdx]
  const canvasH = Math.max(260, charSize + 80)

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas || mode === 'watch') return
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    canvas.width = w * dpr
    canvas.height = canvasH * dpr
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    ctxRef.current = ctx
    paintBackground(ctx, w, canvasH)
  }, [mode, charIdx, darkMode, canvasH])

  function paintBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(18,20,30,0.85)' : 'rgba(252,250,246,0.92)'
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)
    // 米字格
    const gc = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    ctx.strokeStyle = gc; ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.strokeRect(4, 4, w - 8, h - 8)
    ctx.setLineDash([6, 6])
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 4); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(4, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h / 2)
    ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([])
    ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(4, 4); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(w - 4, 4); ctx.lineTo(4, h - 4)
    ctx.stroke()
    if (mode === 'trace') {
      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.76}px "Kaiti SC","STKaiti",serif`
      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
      ctx.fillText(current.char, w / 2, h / 2)
    }
  }

  function getPos(e) {
    const r = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect()
    return { x: e.clientX - r.left, y: e.clientY - r.top, pressure: e.pressure > 0 ? e.pressure : 0.5 }
  }

  function brushW(pressure, velocity) {
    const p = Math.max(0.15, pressure)
    const v = Math.max(0.12, 1 - velocity * 0.065)
    return 2 + 26 * p * v
  }

  const onDown = useCallback(e => {
    e.preventDefault()
    canvasRef.current.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    drawing.current = true
    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    const pos = getPos(e)
    const w = brushW(pos.pressure, 0)
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w }
    setHasDrawing(true)
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
  }, [penColor])

  const onMove = useCallback(e => {
    if (!drawing.current || !lastPoint.current) return
    e.preventDefault()
    const now = Date.now()
    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    const pos = getPos(e)
    const last = lastPoint.current
    const dx = pos.x - last.x, dy = pos.y - last.y
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    if (dist < 0.4) return
    const w2 = brushW(pos.pressure, dist / dt)
    const w1 = last.w
    const nx = -dy / dist, ny = dx / dist
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(last.x + nx * w1 / 2, last.y + ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(pos.x + nx * w2 / 2, pos.y + ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(pos.x - nx * w2 / 2, pos.y - ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(last.x - nx * w1 / 2, last.y - ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
    lastTime.current = now
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w: w2 }
  }, [penColor])

  const onUp = useCallback(() => { drawing.current = false; lastPoint.current = null }, [])

  function clearCanvas() {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current; const ctx = ctxRef.current
    paintBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, canvasH)
    setHasDrawing(false)
  }

  function next() {
    setPracticed(p => [...new Set([...p, charIdx])])
    if (charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1) {
      setCharIdx(i => i + 1); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false)
    } else { onComplete() }
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      {/* Char strip */}
      <div className="px-5 pt-5 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
        {calligraphyChars.map((c, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false) }}
            className="shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
            style={i === charIdx
              ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 3px 0 #B07A00', transform: 'scale(1.06)' }
              : practiced.includes(i) ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
              : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
            {practiced.includes(i) ? '✓' : c.char}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="px-5 flex flex-col gap-4 pb-8">
        {/* Info row */}
        <div className="flex items-baseline gap-3">
          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 56, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1 }}>{current.char}</span>
          <span className="text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{current.pinyin}</span>
          <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{current.meaning}</span>
          <span className="ml-auto text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{practiced.length}/{calligraphyChars.length}</span>
        </div>

        {/* BIG reference character */}
        {mode === 'watch' && (
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pop"
            style={{ height: charSize + 60, background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
            <div className="font-kai font-bold select-none"
              style={{ fontSize: charSize, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1, fontFamily: '"Kaiti SC","STKaiti","楷体",serif' }}>
              {current.char}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Size slider */}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl px-5 py-3.5 flex items-center gap-4">
          <span className="font-kai" style={{ fontSize: 18, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>小</span>
          <input type="range" min="120" max="340" value={charSize}
            onChange={e => setCharSize(Number(e.target.value))}
            className="flex-1 cursor-pointer" style={{ accentColor: '#E9A825' }} />
          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 32, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>大</span>
          <span className="text-sm w-12 text-right" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{charSize}</span>
        </div>

        {/* Mode tabs */}
        <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
          {[['watch','👁 看', '观察字形'], ['trace','🖊 描', '描红练习'], ['free','✍️ 写', '独立书写']].map(([m, label, tip]) => (
            <button key={m} onClick={() => { setMode(m); setHasDrawing(false) }}
              className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all flex flex-col items-center"
              style={mode === m ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
              <span>{label}</span>
              <span className="text-xs font-normal opacity-75">{tip}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Canvas */}
        {(mode === 'trace' || mode === 'free') && (
          <div className="relative animate-pop rounded-2xl overflow-hidden">
            <canvas ref={canvasRef}
              style={{ width: '100%', height: canvasH, display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', borderRadius: 16, border: '2px solid var(--card-border)', cursor: 'crosshair' }}
              onPointerDown={onDown} onPointerMove={onMove}
              onPointerUp={onUp} onPointerLeave={onUp} onPointerCancel={onUp} />
            {hasDrawing && (
              <button onClick={clearCanvas}
                className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm shadow-lg"
                style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>✕</button>
            )}
            {mode === 'trace' && (
              <div className="absolute bottom-3 left-3 text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-lg"
                style={{ background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.35)', color: 'white' }}>描红模式</div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        <button onClick={next}
          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
          style={{ background: '#E9A825', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #B07A00' }}>
          {charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1 ? '写好了，下一字 →' : '完成书写关 🎉'}
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

### FILE 9: Update `src/App.jsx`

Add `import ExerciseHub from './components/ExerciseHub'` at top.
Add `'exercises'` screen state option.
Add ExerciseHub render when screen === 'exercises'.
Pass `onExercises={() => setScreen('exercises')}` to HomePage.

The updated App.jsx should look like:

```jsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import HomePage from './components/HomePage'
import LessonPage from './components/LessonPage'
import CompletionPage from './components/CompletionPage'
import ExerciseHub from './components/ExerciseHub'
import ColorPalette from './components/ColorPalette'
import { useApp } from './context/AppContext'

export default function App() {
  const [screen, setScreen] = useState('home')
  const [currentLesson, setCurrentLesson] = useState(null)
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(() => {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cy_progress') || '{}') }
    catch { return {} }
  })
  const { darkMode, toggleDark } = useApp()

  useEffect(() => { localStorage.setItem('cy_progress', JSON.stringify(progress)) }, [progress])

  function markStageComplete(lessonId, stage) {
    setProgress(p => ({ ...p, [lessonId]: { ...p[lessonId], [stage]: true } }))
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      <button onClick={toggleDark}
        className="fixed top-4 left-4 z-50 glass w-11 h-11 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-lg shadow-lg active:scale-90 transition-all">
        {darkMode ? '☀️' : '🌙'}
      </button>
      <ColorPalette />

      {screen === 'home' && (
        <HomePage
          onSelectLesson={lesson => { setCurrentLesson(lesson); setScreen('lesson') }}
          onExercises={() => setScreen('exercises')}
          progress={progress}
        />
      )}
      {screen === 'lesson' && currentLesson && (
        <LessonPage
          lesson={currentLesson}
          lessonProgress={progress[currentLesson.id] || {}}
          onStageComplete={stage => markStageComplete(currentLesson.id, stage)}
          onComplete={() => setScreen('complete')}
          onBack={() => setScreen('home')}
        />
      )}
      {screen === 'complete' && currentLesson && (
        <CompletionPage lesson={currentLesson} onBack={() => setScreen('home')} />
      )}
      {screen === 'exercises' && (
        <ExerciseHub onBack={() => setScreen('home')} />
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
```

```text
     1→import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'
     3→
     4→export default function WritingCanvas({
     5→  templateChar = '',
     6→  height = 200,
     7→  showTemplate = false,
     8→  showGrid = false,
     9→  overrideColor = null,
    10→  className = '',
    11→}) {
    12→  const { penColor: ctxColor, darkMode } = useApp()
    13→  const color = overrideColor || ctxColor
    14→
    15→  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
    16→  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
    17→  const drawing = useRef(false)
    18→  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
    19→  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
    20→  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    24→    if (!canvas) return
    25→    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    26→    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    27→    canvas.width = w * dpr
    28→    canvas.height = height * dpr
    29→    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    30→    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    31→    ctxRef.current = ctx
    32→    drawBackground(ctx, w, height)
    33→  }, [height, showGrid, showTemplate, templateChar, darkMode])
    34→
    35→  function drawBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    36→    // Clear
    37→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    38→
    39→    const bgColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)' : 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)'
    40→    ctx.fillStyle = bgColor
    41→    roundRect(ctx, 0, 0, w, h, 12)
    42→    ctx.fill()
    43→
    44→    if (showGrid) {
    45→      const gridColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    46→      ctx.strokeStyle = gridColor
    47→      ctx.lineWidth = 1
    48→      // outer
    49→      ctx.strokeRect(2, 2, w - 4, h - 4)
    50→      // cross (dashed)
    51→      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
    52→      ctx.beginPath()
    53→      ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 2)
    54→      ctx.moveTo(2, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h / 2)
    55→      ctx.stroke()
    56→      ctx.setLineDash([])
    57→      // diagonals light
    58→      ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    59→      ctx.beginPath()
    60→      ctx.moveTo(2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h - 2)
    61→      ctx.moveTo(w - 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(2, h - 2)
    62→      ctx.stroke()
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    if (showTemplate && templateChar) {
    66→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.72}px "Kaiti SC", serif`
    67→      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.07)'
    68→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    69→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    70→      ctx.fillText(templateChar, w / 2, h / 2)
    71→    }
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
    75→    ctx.beginPath()
    76→    ctx.moveTo(x + r, y)
    77→    ctx.lineTo(x + w - r, y)
    78→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + r)
    79→    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - r)
    80→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - r, y + h)
    81→    ctx.lineTo(x + r, y + h)
    82→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - r)
    83→    ctx.lineTo(x, y + r)
    84→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + r, y)
    85→    ctx.closePath()
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  function getBrushWidth(pressure, velocity) {
    89→    const min = 1.5
    90→    const max = 20
    91→    const p = pressure > 0 ? Math.max(0.1, pressure) : 0.5
    92→    // slower = wider (like a brush)
    93→    const vFactor = Math.max(0.15, 1 - velocity * 0.06)
    94→    return min + (max - min) * p * vFactor
    95→  }
    96→
    97→  function getPos(e, canvas) {
    98→    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    99→    return {
   100→      x: e.clientX - rect.left,
   101→      y: e.clientY - rect.top,
   102→      pressure: e.pressure ?? 0.5,
   103→    }
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  function drawBrushSegment(ctx, p1, p2, w1, w2, col) {
   107→    if (!p1 || !p2) return
   108→    const dx = p2.x - p1.x
   109→    const dy = p2.y - p1.y
   110→    const len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
   111→    if (len < 0.5) return
   112→
   113→    // Perpendicular direction
   114→    const nx = -dy / len
   115→    const ny = dx / len
   116→
   117→    // Draw tapered quad shape
   118→    ctx.beginPath()
   119→    ctx.moveTo(p1.x + nx * w1 / 2, p1.y + ny * w1 / 2)
   120→    ctx.lineTo(p2.x + nx * w2 / 2, p2.y + ny * w2 / 2)
   121→    ctx.lineTo(p2.x - nx * w2 / 2, p2.y - ny * w2 / 2)
   122→    ctx.lineTo(p1.x - nx * w1 / 2, p1.y - ny * w1 / 2)
   123→    ctx.closePath()
   124→    ctx.fillStyle = col
   125→    ctx.fill()
   126→
   127→    // Ink bleed layer
   128→    ctx.beginPath()
   129→    ctx.arc(p2.x, p2.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   130→    ctx.fillStyle = col
   131→    ctx.fill()
   132→  }
   133→
   134→  const onPointerDown = useCallback(e => {
   135→    e.preventDefault()
   136→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   137→    canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
   138→    drawing.current = true
   139→    lastTime.current = Date.now()
   140→    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
   141→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0) }
   142→    setHasDrawing(true)
   143→
   144→    // Dot for tap
   145→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   146→    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0)
   147→    ctx.beginPath()
   148→    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   149→    ctx.fillStyle = color
   150→    ctx.fill()
   151→  }, [color])
   152→
   153→  const onPointerMove = useCallback(e => {
   154→    if (!drawing.current) return
   155→    e.preventDefault()
   156→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   157→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   158→    const now = Date.now()
   159→    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
   160→    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
   161→    const last = lastPoint.current
   162→    if (!last) return
   163→
   164→    const dx = pos.x - last.x
   165→    const dy = pos.y - last.y
   166→    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
   167→    const velocity = dist / dt // px/ms
   168→    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, velocity)
   169→
   170→    drawBrushSegment(ctx, last, pos, last.width || w, w, color)
   171→
   172→    lastTime.current = now
   173→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: w }
   174→  }, [color])
   175→
   176→  const onPointerUp = useCallback(() => {
   177→    drawing.current = false
   178→    lastPoint.current = null
   179→  }, [])
   180→
   181→  function clear() {
   182→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   183→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   184→    drawBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, height)
   185→    setHasDrawing(false)
   186→  }
   187→
   188→  const bgStyle = darkMode
   189→    ? { background: 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' }
   190→    : { background: 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' }
   191→
   192→  return (
   193→    <div className={`relative w-full ${className}`}>
   194→      <canvas
   195→        ref={canvasRef}
   196→        style={{ width: '100%', height, borderRadius: 14, cursor: 'crosshair', display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', ...bgStyle }}
   197→        onPointerDown={onPointerDown}
   198→        onPointerMove={onPointerMove}
   199→        onPointerUp={onPointerUp}
   200→        onPointerLeave={onPointerUp}
   201→        onPointerCancel={onPointerUp}
   202→      />
   203→      {hasDrawing && (
   204→        <button
   205→          onClick={clear}
   206→          className="absolute top-2 right-2 w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-all"
   207→          style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}
   208→        >✕</button>
   209→      )}
   210→    </div>
   211→  )
   212→}
   213→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→const AppContext = createContext({})
     4→
     5→export function AppProvider({ children }) {
     6→  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false)
     7→  const [penColor, setPenColor] = useState('#1A1A1A')
     8→
     9→  function toggleDark() {
    10→    setDarkMode(d => {
    11→      const next = !d
    12→      document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', next)
    13→      return next
    14→    })
    15→  }
    16→
    17→  return (
    18→    <AppContext.Provider value={{ darkMode, toggleDark, penColor, setPenColor }}>
    19→      {children}
    20→    </AppContext.Provider>
    21→  )
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function useApp() { return useContext(AppContext) }
    25→
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { exercises } from '../data/exercises'
import Ex1Words from './exercises/Ex1Words'
import Ex2Meaning from './exercises/Ex2Meaning'
import Ex3Pause from './exercises/Ex3Pause'
import Ex4Comprehension from './exercises/Ex4Comprehension'
import Ex5Reading from './exercises/Ex5Reading'
import Ex6Calligraphy from './exercises/Ex6Calligraphy'

const COMPS = {
  words: Ex1Words, meaning: Ex2Meaning, pause: Ex3Pause,
  comprehension: Ex4Comprehension, reading: Ex5Reading, calligraphy: Ex6Calligraphy,
}

export default function ExerciseHub({ onBack }) {
  const [active, setActive] = useState(null)
  const [done, setDone] = useState([])

  if (active) {
    const Comp = COMPS[active.id]
    return (
      <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
        <div className="glass-strong sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 pl-16">
          <button onClick={() => setActive(null)} className="glass w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>←</button>
          <span className="text-2xl">{active.emoji}</span>
          <span className="font-kai font-bold text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{active.title}</span>
          <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{active.desc}</span>
        </div>
        <Comp onComplete={() => { setDone(p => [...new Set([...p, active.id])]); setActive(null) }} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      <div className="glass-strong sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 pl-16">
        <button onClick={onBack} className="glass w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>←</button>
        <span className="font-kai font-bold text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>练习园</span>
        <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{done.length}/6 完成</span>
      </div>

      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <p className="text-base text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>文言文二则 · 全套练习</p>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          {exercises.map(ex => {
            const isDone = done.includes(ex.id)
            return (
              <button key={ex.id} onClick={() => setActive(ex)}
                className="glass rounded-3xl p-5 text-left active:scale-95 transition-all flex flex-col gap-3"
                style={{ borderTop: `3px solid ${ex.color}` }}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <span className="text-3xl">{ex.emoji}</span>
                  {isDone
                    ? <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>✓ 完成</span>
                    : <span className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>待完成</span>}
                </div>
                <div>
                  <div className="font-kai text-xl font-bold mb-0.5" style={{ color: ex.color }}>{ex.title}</div>
                  <div className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{ex.desc}</div>
                </div>
              </button>
            )
          })}
        </div>
        {done.length === 6 && (
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl p-6 text-center animate-pop">
            <div className="text-5xl mb-3">🏆</div>
            <p className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>全部完成！</p>
            <p className="text-base mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>你已掌握本课所有练习</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { wordsData } from '../../data/exercises'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Ex1Words({ onComplete }) {
  const [section, setSection] = useState(0)
  const [pronAnswers, setPronAnswers] = useState({})
  const [gwIdx, setGwIdx] = useState(0)

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
        {['字音辨析', '组词练习', '拼音写词'].map((s, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => setSection(i)}
            className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"
            style={section === i ? { background: '#1CB0F6', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
            {s}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {section === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>判断读音是否正确，错的写出正确读音</p>
          {wordsData.pronunciation.map((item, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                <span className="font-kai text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{item.sentence}</span>
                <span className="text-sm px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: '#1CB0F6' }}>标注：{item.given}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex gap-3 items-center">
                <button onClick={() => setPronAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [i]: 'correct' }))}
                  className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-base transition-all"
                  style={pronAnswers[i] === 'correct' ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' } : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }}>
                  ✓ 正确
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => setPronAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [i]: 'wrong' }))}
                  className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-bold text-base transition-all"
                  style={pronAnswers[i] === 'wrong' ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' } : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }}>
                  ✗ 有误
                </button>
              </div>
              {pronAnswers[i] && (
                <div className="mt-2 text-sm animate-pop" style={{ color: item.correct ? '#58CC02' : '#FF4B4B' }}>
                  {item.correct ? '✓ 读音正确！' : `✗ 正确读音是：${item.pinyin}`}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {section === 1 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-4">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>用 Pencil 给下列汉字组词</p>
          <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap justify-center">
            {wordsData.groupWords.map((item, i) => (
              <button key={i} onClick={() => setGwIdx(i)}
                className="w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
                style={gwIdx === i ? { background: '#1CB0F6', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 3px 0 #0091D4' } : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
                {item.char}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div key={gwIdx} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 animate-pop flex flex-col gap-3">
            <div className="text-center font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 72, color: '#1CB0F6', lineHeight: 1 }}>
              {wordsData.groupWords[gwIdx].char}
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>用 Pencil 写出两个词语</p>
            <WritingCanvas height={130} showGrid />
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 pt-2" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)' }}>
              <span className="text-xs" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>参考：</span>
              {wordsData.groupWords[gwIdx].examples.map(e => (
                <span key={e} className="text-sm px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{e}</span>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {section === 2 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>看拼音，用 Pencil 写汉字词语</p>
          {wordsData.pinyin.map((item, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
              <div className="text-lg font-medium text-center py-1 tracking-wider" style={{ color: '#1CB0F6' }}>{item.py}</div>
              <WritingCanvas height={90} showGrid />
              <details>
                <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>查看答案</summary>
                <span className="font-kai text-base ml-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{item.answer}</span>
              </details>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      <button onClick={onComplete}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
        style={{ background: '#1CB0F6', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #0091D4' }}>
        完成字词关 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { meaningData } from '../../data/exercises'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Ex2Meaning({ onComplete }) {
  const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0)
  const [revealed, setRevealed] = useState([])
  const group = meaningData[idx]

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="flex gap-2 items-center">
        {meaningData.map((_, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => setIdx(i)} className="flex-1 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-all"
            style={{ background: i === idx ? '#58CC02' : i < idx ? '#58CC0255' : 'var(--bg2)' }} />
        ))}
        <span className="text-sm shrink-0" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{idx + 1}/{meaningData.length}</span>
      </div>

      <span className="self-start text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-medium" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>{group.source}</span>

      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
        <p className="font-kai text-2xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{group.sentence}</p>
      </div>

      <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>解释加点字词的意思（用 Pencil 写）</p>

      {group.items.map((item, i) => {
        const rid = `${idx}-${i}`
        return (
          <div key={i} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <span className="font-kai text-4xl font-bold" style={{ color: '#58CC02' }}>{item.word}</span>
              <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>的意思是——</span>
            </div>
            <WritingCanvas height={80} showGrid />
            {!revealed.includes(rid) ? (
              <button onClick={() => setRevealed(p => [...p, rid])}
                className="text-sm py-2 rounded-xl transition-all"
                style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #58CC02', color: '#58CC02' }}>
                查看答案
              </button>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-base py-2 px-3 rounded-xl font-kai animate-pop" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>
                {item.hint}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )
      })}

      <div className="flex gap-3">
        {idx > 0 && (
          <button onClick={() => setIdx(i => i - 1)} className="flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-2xl font-bold text-base"
            style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>← 上一组</button>
        )}
        {idx < meaningData.length - 1 ? (
          <button onClick={() => setIdx(i => i + 1)} className="flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
            style={{ background: '#58CC02', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #46A302' }}>下一组 →</button>
        ) : (
          <button onClick={onComplete} className="flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
            style={{ background: '#58CC02', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #46A302' }}>完成字义关 ✓</button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { pauseData } from '../../data/exercises'

export default function Ex3Pause({ onComplete }) {
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState({})
  const allAnswered = pauseData.every((_, i) => answers[i] !== undefined)

  function speak(text) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text.replace(/\//g, '，'))
    u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.75
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
        <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>📍 断句与朗读节奏</p>
        <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>选出正确答案，点击选项可听朗读</p>
      </div>

      {pauseData.map((item, qi) => (
        <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {item.q}</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
            {item.options.map((opt, oi) => {
              const chosen = answers[qi] === oi
              const isCorrect = oi === item.answer
              const showResult = answers[qi] !== undefined
              return (
                <button key={oi}
                  onClick={() => { setAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [qi]: oi })); speak(opt) }}
                  className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all font-kai"
                  style={
                    !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                    : chosen && isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                    : chosen ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                    : isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                    : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                  }>
                  {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                  {!showResult && <span className="float-right">🔊</span>}
                </button>
              )
            })}
          </div>
          {answers[qi] !== undefined && (
            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-2 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
              💡 {item.explanation}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      ))}

      {allAnswered && (
        <button onClick={onComplete}
          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg animate-pop active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
          style={{ background: '#FF9600', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC7700' }}>
          完成断句关 →
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

```

```jsx
export default function Ex4Comprehension({ onComplete }) {

        {['选择题', '句子赏析'].map((t, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => setTab(i)}
            className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-base font-bold transition-all"
            style={tab === i ? { background: '#CE82FF', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
            {t}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {tab === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-5">
          {mc.map((item, qi) => (
            <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
              <p className="font-kai text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {item.q}</p>

              {item.type === 'multi-match' ? (
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-3">
                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">
                    {item.meanings.map(m => (
                      <div key={m.id} className="text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded-xl" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{m.text}</div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  {item.sentences.map((s, si) => {
                    const key = `${qi}-${si}`
                    const chosen = matchAnswers[key]
                    const showResult = chosen !== undefined
                    return (
                      <div key={si} className="glass rounded-xl p-3 flex flex-col gap-2">
                        <p className="font-kai text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{s.text}</p>
                        <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                          {['a','b','c','d','e'].map(opt => (
                            <button key={opt}
                              onClick={() => setMatchAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [key]: opt }))}
                              className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"
                              style={
                                !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
                                : chosen === opt && opt === s.answer ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                                : chosen === opt ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                                : opt === s.answer && showResult ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
                                : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
                              }>{opt}</button>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )
                  })}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                  {item.options.map((opt, oi) => {
                    const chosen = mcAnswers[qi] === oi
                    const isCorrect = oi === item.answer
                    const showResult = mcAnswers[qi] !== undefined
                    return (
                      <button key={oi} onClick={() => setMcAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [qi]: oi }))}
                        className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all"
                        style={
                          !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                          : chosen && isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                          : chosen ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
                          : isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
                          : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                        }>
                        {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                      </button>
                    )
                  })}
                  {mcAnswers[qi] !== undefined && item.explanation && (
                    <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-2 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
                      💡 {item.explanation}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {tab === 1 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-5">
          {comprehensionData.sentenceAnalysis.map((block, bi) => (
            <div key={bi} className="flex flex-col gap-4">
              <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: '#CE82FF' }}>「{block.sentence}」</p>
              </div>
              {block.questions.map((q, qi) => (
                <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
                  <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{q.q}</p>
                  {q.type === 'choice' ? (
                    <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
                      {q.options.map((opt, oi) => (
                        <div key={oi} className="px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-base"
                          style={{ background: oi === q.answer ? '#EEE4FF' : 'var(--bg2)', color: oi === q.answer ? '#9B30D0' : 'var(--text2)', border: oi === q.answer ? '2px solid #CE82FF' : '2px solid transparent' }}>
                          {oi === q.answer ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                        </div>
                      ))}
                      {q.explanation && <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>💡 {q.explanation}</p>}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <>
                      <WritingCanvas height={90} showGrid />
                      {q.blanks && (
                        <details>
                          <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: '#CE82FF' }}>查看参考答案</summary>
                          <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                            {q.blanks.map((b, i) => (
                              <span key={i} className="text-sm px-2 py-1 rounded-lg font-kai" style={{ background: '#EEE4FF', color: '#9B30D0' }}>{b}</span>
                            ))}
                          </div>
                        </details>
                      )}
                    </>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      <button onClick={onComplete}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
        style={{ background: '#CE82FF', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #9B30D0' }}>
        完成理解关 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}
```
