import { useState } from 'react'
import { readingData } from '../../data/exercises'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

export default function Ex5Reading({ onComplete }) {
  const [showTrans, setShowTrans] = useState([])

  function speak(text) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text); u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.8
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      <div className="text-center">
        <div className="text-4xl mb-2">🕯️</div>
        <h3 className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: '#FF4B4B' }}>凿壁偷光</h3>
        <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>课外拓展阅读</p>
      </div>

      {readingData.text.map(para => (
        <div key={para.id} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
            <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed flex-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{para.original}</p>
            <button onClick={() => speak(para.original)}
              className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 text-lg"
              style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>🔊</button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {para.notes.map((n, i) => (
              <span key={i} className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>📌 {n}</span>
            ))}
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => setShowTrans(p => p.includes(para.id) ? p.filter(x => x !== para.id) : [...p, para.id])}
            className="text-sm py-2 rounded-xl transition-all"
            style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #FF4B4B', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>
            {showTrans.includes(para.id) ? '收起译文 ↑' : '查看译文 ↓'}
          </button>
          {showTrans.includes(para.id) && (
            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{para.translation}</p>
          )}
        </div>
      ))}

      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <p className="font-kai text-lg font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>阅读练习</p>
        {readingData.questions.map((q, qi) => (
          <div key={qi} className="flex flex-col gap-2">
            <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {q.q}</p>
            <WritingCanvas height={q.type === 'open' ? 160 : 90} showGrid />
            {(q.answer || q.reference) && (
              <details>
                <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: '#FF4B4B' }}>查看参考答案</summary>
                <div className="mt-2 text-base px-3 py-2 rounded-xl font-kai" style={{ background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000' }}>
                  {q.reference || q.answer}
                </div>
              </details>
            )}
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      <button onClick={onComplete}
        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
        style={{ background: '#FF4B4B', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC0000' }}>
        完成拓展关 →
      </button>
    </div>
  )
}

import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
import { calligraphyChars } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'

export default function Ex6Calligraphy({ onComplete }) {
  const { penColor, darkMode } = useApp()
  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
  const [charSize, setCharSize] = useState(220)
  const [mode, setMode] = useState('watch')
  const [practiced, setPracticed] = useState([])
  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
  const drawing = useRef(false)
  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
  const current = calligraphyChars[charIdx]
  const canvasH = Math.max(260, charSize + 80)

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas || mode === 'watch') return
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    canvas.width = w * dpr
    canvas.height = canvasH * dpr
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    ctxRef.current = ctx
    paintBackground(ctx, w, canvasH)
  }, [mode, charIdx, darkMode, canvasH])

  function paintBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(18,20,30,0.85)' : 'rgba(252,250,246,0.92)'
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)
    // 米字格
    const gc = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    ctx.strokeStyle = gc; ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.strokeRect(4, 4, w - 8, h - 8)
    ctx.setLineDash([6, 6])
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 4); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(4, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h / 2)
    ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([])
    ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(4, 4); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(w - 4, 4); ctx.lineTo(4, h - 4)
    ctx.stroke()
    if (mode === 'trace') {
      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.76}px "Kaiti SC","STKaiti",serif`
      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
      ctx.fillText(current.char, w / 2, h / 2)
    }
  }

  function getPos(e) {
    const r = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect()
    return { x: e.clientX - r.left, y: e.clientY - r.top, pressure: e.pressure > 0 ? e.pressure : 0.5 }
  }

  function brushW(pressure, velocity) {
    const p = Math.max(0.15, pressure)
    const v = Math.max(0.12, 1 - velocity * 0.065)
    return 2 + 26 * p * v
  }

  const onDown = useCallback(e => {
    e.preventDefault()
    canvasRef.current.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    drawing.current = true
    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    const pos = getPos(e)
    const w = brushW(pos.pressure, 0)
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w }
    setHasDrawing(true)
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
  }, [penColor])

  const onMove = useCallback(e => {
    if (!drawing.current || !lastPoint.current) return
    e.preventDefault()
    const now = Date.now()
    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    const pos = getPos(e)
    const last = lastPoint.current
    const dx = pos.x - last.x, dy = pos.y - last.y
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    if (dist < 0.4) return
    const w2 = brushW(pos.pressure, dist / dt)
    const w1 = last.w
    const nx = -dy / dist, ny = dx / dist
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(last.x + nx * w1 / 2, last.y + ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(pos.x + nx * w2 / 2, pos.y + ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(pos.x - nx * w2 / 2, pos.y - ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(last.x - nx * w1 / 2, last.y - ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
    lastTime.current = now
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w: w2 }
  }, [penColor])

  const onUp = useCallback(() => { drawing.current = false; lastPoint.current = null }, [])

  function clearCanvas() {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current; const ctx = ctxRef.current
    paintBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, canvasH)
    setHasDrawing(false)
  }

  function next() {
    setPracticed(p => [...new Set([...p, charIdx])])
    if (charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1) {
      setCharIdx(i => i + 1); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false)
    } else { onComplete() }
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      {/* Char strip */}
      <div className="px-5 pt-5 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
        {calligraphyChars.map((c, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false) }}
            className="shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
            style={i === charIdx
              ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 3px 0 #B07A00', transform: 'scale(1.06)' }
              : practiced.includes(i) ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
              : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
            {practiced.includes(i) ? '✓' : c.char}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="px-5 flex flex-col gap-4 pb-8">
        {/* Info row */}
        <div className="flex items-baseline gap-3">
          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 56, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1 }}>{current.char}</span>
          <span className="text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{current.pinyin}</span>
          <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{current.meaning}</span>
          <span className="ml-auto text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{practiced.length}/{calligraphyChars.length}</span>
        </div>

        {/* BIG reference character */}
        {mode === 'watch' && (
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pop"
            style={{ height: charSize + 60, background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
            <div className="font-kai font-bold select-none"
              style={{ fontSize: charSize, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1, fontFamily: '"Kaiti SC","STKaiti","楷体",serif' }}>
              {current.char}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Size slider */}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl px-5 py-3.5 flex items-center gap-4">
          <span className="font-kai" style={{ fontSize: 18, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>小</span>
          <input type="range" min="120" max="340" value={charSize}
            onChange={e => setCharSize(Number(e.target.value))}
            className="flex-1 cursor-pointer" style={{ accentColor: '#E9A825' }} />
          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 32, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>大</span>
          <span className="text-sm w-12 text-right" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{charSize}</span>
        </div>

        {/* Mode tabs */}
        <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
          {[['watch','👁 看', '观察字形'], ['trace','🖊 描', '描红练习'], ['free','✍️ 写', '独立书写']].map(([m, label, tip]) => (
            <button key={m} onClick={() => { setMode(m); setHasDrawing(false) }}
              className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all flex flex-col items-center"
              style={mode === m ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
              <span>{label}</span>
              <span className="text-xs font-normal opacity-75">{tip}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Canvas */}
        {(mode === 'trace' || mode === 'free') && (
          <div className="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden">
            <canvas ref={canvasRef}
              style={{ width: '100%', height: canvasH, display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', borderRadius: 16, border: '2px solid var(--card-border)', cursor: 'crosshair' }}
              onPointerDown={onDown} onPointerMove={onMove}
              onPointerUp={onUp} onPointerLeave={onUp} onPointerCancel={onUp} />
            {hasDrawing && (
              <button onClick={clearCanvas}
                className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm shadow-lg"
                style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>✕</button>
            )}
            {mode === 'trace' && (
              <div className="absolute bottom-3 left-3 text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-lg"
                style={{ background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.35)', color: 'white' }}>描红模式</div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        <button onClick={next}
          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
          style={{ background: '#E9A825', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #B07A00' }}>
          {charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1 ? '写好了，下一字 →' : '完成书写关 🎉'}
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import HomePage from './components/HomePage'
import LessonPage from './components/LessonPage'
import CompletionPage from './components/CompletionPage'
import ExerciseHub from './components/ExerciseHub'
import ColorPalette from './components/ColorPalette'
import { useApp } from './context/AppContext'

export default function App() {
  const [screen, setScreen] = useState('home')
  const [currentLesson, setCurrentLesson] = useState(null)
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(() => {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cy_progress') || '{}') }
    catch { return {} }
  })
  const { darkMode, toggleDark } = useApp()

  useEffect(() => { localStorage.setItem('cy_progress', JSON.stringify(progress)) }, [progress])

  function markStageComplete(lessonId, stage) {
    setProgress(p => ({ ...p, [lessonId]: { ...p[lessonId], [stage]: true } }))
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      <button onClick={toggleDark}
        className="fixed top-4 left-4 z-50 glass w-11 h-11 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-lg shadow-lg active:scale-90 transition-all">
        {darkMode ? '☀️' : '🌙'}
      </button>
      <ColorPalette />

      {screen === 'home' && (
        <HomePage
          onSelectLesson={lesson => { setCurrentLesson(lesson); setScreen('lesson') }}
          onExercises={() => setScreen('exercises')}
          progress={progress}
        />
      )}
      {screen === 'lesson' && currentLesson && (
        <LessonPage
          lesson={currentLesson}
          lessonProgress={progress[currentLesson.id] || {}}
          onStageComplete={stage => markStageComplete(currentLesson.id, stage)}
          onComplete={() => setScreen('complete')}
          onBack={() => setScreen('home')}
        />
      )}
      {screen === 'complete' && currentLesson && (
        <CompletionPage lesson={currentLesson} onBack={() => setScreen('home')} />
      )}
      {screen === 'exercises' && (
        <ExerciseHub onBack={() => setScreen('home')} />
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

import { lessons } from '../data/lessons'
import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'

function StagesDots({ lessonId, progress }) {
  const stages = ['listen', 'learn', 'read', 'think', 'write']
  const lp = progress[lessonId] || {}
  const done = stages.filter(s => lp[s]).length
  return (
    <div className="flex gap-1.5 items-center">
      {stages.map(s => (
        <div key={s} className="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-all"
          style={{ background: lp[s] ? '#58CC02' : 'var(--text3)', transform: lp[s] ? 'scale(1.1)' : 'scale(1)' }} />
      ))}
      <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{done}/5</span>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function HomePage({ onSelectLesson, onExercises, progress }) {
  return (
    <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-16 flex flex-col gap-10">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="text-center pt-8">
        <div className="text-5xl mb-4">📖</div>
        <h1 className="font-kai text-4xl font-bold mb-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>汉语言艺术</h1>
        <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>文言文·第一册</p>
      </div>

      {/* Lesson Cards */}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-5">
        {lessons.map((lesson, i) => {
          const lp = progress[lesson.id] || {}
          const stages = ['listen', 'learn', 'read', 'think', 'write']
          const done = stages.filter(s => lp[s]).length
          const allDone = done === 5
          return (
            <button
              key={lesson.id}
              onClick={() => onSelectLesson(lesson)}
              className="glass w-full text-left rounded-3xl overflow-hidden active:scale-98 transition-all hover:shadow-xl"
            >
              <div className="flex items-center gap-5 p-6">
                <div
                  className="w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-kai text-4xl font-bold shrink-0 shadow-lg"
                  style={{ background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${lesson.color}, ${lesson.color}CC)`, color: 'white' }}
                >
                  {lesson.coverChar}
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1.5">
                    <span className="font-kai text-xl font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{lesson.title}</span>
                    {allDone && (
                      <span className="text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-semibold" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>已完成 ✓</span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm mb-3" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{lesson.author}</p>
                  <StagesDots lessonId={lesson.id} progress={progress} />
                </div>
                <div className="text-4xl">{lesson.emoji}</div>
              </div>
              <div className="h-2" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
                <div
                  className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700"
                  style={{ width: `${(done / 5) * 100}%`, background: lesson.color }}
                />
              </div>
            </button>
          )
        })}

        {/* Exercise entry */}
        <button
          onClick={onExercises}
          className="glass w-full rounded-3xl p-5 flex items-center gap-4 active:scale-98 transition-all"
          style={{ borderTop: '3px solid #FF9600' }}
        >
          <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-3xl shrink-0" style={{ background: '#FFF0D4' }}>📝</div>
          <div className="flex-1 text-left">
            <div className="font-kai text-xl font-bold mb-0.5" style={{ color: '#FF9600' }}>练习园</div>
            <div className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>字词 · 断句 · 理解 · 书写 · 六大关卡全套练习</div>
          </div>
          <span className="text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>→</span>
        </button>
      </div>

      <p className="text-center text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>用 Apple Pencil 书写，效果更好 ✏️</p>
    </div>
  )
}

```

The approach is iterative — start with one lesson, polish deeply, then expand. Educational philosophy: universal values, critical thinking, language aesthetics, writing skills, and avoiding formalist traditional teaching. The user explicitly requested:

     1→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'

     9→export default function App() {
    10→  const [screen, setScreen] = useState('home')
    11→  const [currentLesson, setCurrentLesson] = useState(null)
    12→  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(() => {
    13→    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('cy_progress') || '{}') }
    14→    catch { return {} }
    15→  })
    16→  const { darkMode, toggleDark } = useApp()
    17→
    18→  useEffect(() => { localStorage.setItem('cy_progress', JSON.stringify(progress)) }, [progress])
    19→
    20→  function markStageComplete(lessonId, stage) {
    21→    setProgress(p => ({ ...p, [lessonId]: { ...p[lessonId], [stage]: true } }))
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  return (
    25→    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
    26→      <button onClick={toggleDark}
    27→        className="fixed top-4 left-4 z-50 glass w-11 h-11 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-lg shadow-lg active:scale-90 transition-all">
    28→        {darkMode ? '☀️' : '🌙'}
    29→      </button>
    30→      <ColorPalette />
    31→
    32→      {screen === 'home' && (
    33→        <HomePage
    34→          onSelectLesson={lesson => { setCurrentLesson(lesson); setScreen('lesson') }}
    35→          onExercises={() => setScreen('exercises')}
    36→          progress={progress}
    37→        />
    38→      )}
    39→      {screen === 'lesson' && currentLesson && (
    40→        <LessonPage
    41→          lesson={currentLesson}
    42→          lessonProgress={progress[currentLesson.id] || {}}
    43→          onStageComplete={stage => markStageComplete(currentLesson.id, stage)}
    44→          onComplete={() => setScreen('complete')}
    45→          onBack={() => setScreen('home')}
    46→        />
    47→      )}
    48→      {screen === 'complete' && currentLesson && (
    49→        <CompletionPage lesson={currentLesson} onBack={() => setScreen('home')} />
    50→      )}
    51→      {screen === 'exercises' && (
    52→        <ExerciseHub onBack={() => setScreen('home')} />
    53→      )}
    54→    </div>
    55→  )
    56→}
    57→

    21→
    22→      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5">
    23→        <p className="font-kai text-2xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{group.sentence}</p>
    24→      </div>
    25→
    26→      <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>解释加点字词的意思（用 Pencil 写）</p>

    41→                查看答案
    42→              </button>
    43→            ) : (
    44→              <div className="text-base py-2 px-3 rounded-xl font-kai animate-pop" style={{ background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }}>
    45→                {item.hint}
    46→              </div>
    47→            )}
    48→          </div>
    49→        )
    50→      })}
    51→
    52→      <div className="flex gap-3">

    55→            style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>← 上一组</button>
    56→        )}
    57→        {idx < meaningData.length - 1 ? (

     1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import { pauseData } from '../../data/exercises'
     3→
     4→export default function Ex3Pause({ onComplete }) {
     5→  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState({})
     6→  const allAnswered = pauseData.every((_, i) => answers[i] !== undefined)
     7→
     8→  function speak(text) {
     9→    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    10→    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text.replace(/\//g, '，'))
    11→    u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.75
    12→    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
    17→      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
    18→        <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>📍 断句与朗读节奏</p>
    19→        <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>选出正确答案，点击选项可听朗读</p>
    20→      </div>
    21→
    22→      {pauseData.map((item, qi) => (
    23→        <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
    24→          <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {item.q}</p>
    25→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
    26→            {item.options.map((opt, oi) => {
    27→              const chosen = answers[qi] === oi
    28→              const isCorrect = oi === item.answer
    29→              const showResult = answers[qi] !== undefined
    30→              return (
    31→                <button key={oi}
    32→                  onClick={() => { setAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [qi]: oi })); speak(opt) }}
    33→                  className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all font-kai"
    34→                  style={
    35→                    !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
    36→                    : chosen && isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
    37→                    : chosen ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
    38→                    : isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
    39→                    : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
    40→                  }>
    41→                  {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
    42→                  {!showResult && <span className="float-right">🔊</span>}
    43→                </button>
    44→              )
    45→            })}
    46→          </div>
    47→          {answers[qi] !== undefined && (
    48→            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-2 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
    49→              💡 {item.explanation}
    50→            </p>
    51→          )}
    52→        </div>
    53→      ))}
    54→
    55→      {allAnswered && (
    56→        <button onClick={onComplete}
    57→          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg animate-pop active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
    58→          style={{ background: '#FF9600', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC7700' }}>
    59→          完成断句关 →
    60→        </button>
    61→      )}
    62→    </div>
    63→  )
    64→}
    65→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'
     3→
     4→export default function WritingCanvas({
     5→  templateChar = '',
     6→  height = 200,
     7→  showTemplate = false,
     8→  showGrid = false,
     9→  overrideColor = null,
    10→  className = '',
    11→}) {
    12→  const { penColor: ctxColor, darkMode } = useApp()
    13→  const color = overrideColor || ctxColor
    14→
    15→  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
    16→  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
    17→  const drawing = useRef(false)
    18→  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
    19→  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
    20→  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    24→    if (!canvas) return
    25→    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    26→    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    27→    canvas.width = w * dpr
    28→    canvas.height = height * dpr
    29→    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    30→    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    31→    ctxRef.current = ctx
    32→    drawBackground(ctx, w, height)
    33→  }, [height, showGrid, showTemplate, templateChar, darkMode])
    34→
    35→  function drawBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    36→    // Clear
    37→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    38→
    39→    const bgColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)' : 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)'
    40→    ctx.fillStyle = bgColor
    41→    roundRect(ctx, 0, 0, w, h, 12)
    42→    ctx.fill()
    43→
    44→    if (showGrid) {
    45→      const gridColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    46→      ctx.strokeStyle = gridColor
    47→      ctx.lineWidth = 1
    48→      // outer
    49→      ctx.strokeRect(2, 2, w - 4, h - 4)
    50→      // cross (dashed)
    51→      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
    52→      ctx.beginPath()
    53→      ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 2)
    54→      ctx.moveTo(2, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h / 2)
    55→      ctx.stroke()
    56→      ctx.setLineDash([])
    57→      // diagonals light
    58→      ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    59→      ctx.beginPath()
    60→      ctx.moveTo(2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h - 2)
    61→      ctx.moveTo(w - 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(2, h - 2)
    62→      ctx.stroke()
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    if (showTemplate && templateChar) {
    66→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.72}px "Kaiti SC", serif`
    67→      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.07)'
    68→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    69→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    70→      ctx.fillText(templateChar, w / 2, h / 2)
    71→    }
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
    75→    ctx.beginPath()
    76→    ctx.moveTo(x + r, y)
    77→    ctx.lineTo(x + w - r, y)
    78→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + r)
    79→    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - r)
    80→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - r, y + h)
    81→    ctx.lineTo(x + r, y + h)
    82→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - r)
    83→    ctx.lineTo(x, y + r)
    84→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + r, y)
    85→    ctx.closePath()
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  function getBrushWidth(pressure, velocity) {
    89→    const min = 1.5
    90→    const max = 20
    91→    const p = pressure > 0 ? Math.max(0.1, pressure) : 0.5
    92→    // slower = wider (like a brush)
    93→    const vFactor = Math.max(0.15, 1 - velocity * 0.06)
    94→    return min + (max - min) * p * vFactor
    95→  }
    96→
    97→  function getPos(e, canvas) {
    98→    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    99→    return {
   100→      x: e.clientX - rect.left,
   101→      y: e.clientY - rect.top,
   102→      pressure: e.pressure ?? 0.5,
   103→    }
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  function drawBrushSegment(ctx, p1, p2, w1, w2, col) {
   107→    if (!p1 || !p2) return
   108→    const dx = p2.x - p1.x
   109→    const dy = p2.y - p1.y
   110→    const len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
   111→    if (len < 0.5) return
   112→
   113→    // Perpendicular direction
   114→    const nx = -dy / len
   115→    const ny = dx / len
   116→
   117→    // Draw tapered quad shape
   118→    ctx.beginPath()
   119→    ctx.moveTo(p1.x + nx * w1 / 2, p1.y + ny * w1 / 2)
   120→    ctx.lineTo(p2.x + nx * w2 / 2, p2.y + ny * w2 / 2)
   121→    ctx.lineTo(p2.x - nx * w2 / 2, p2.y - ny * w2 / 2)
   122→    ctx.lineTo(p1.x - nx * w1 / 2, p1.y - ny * w1 / 2)
   123→    ctx.closePath()
   124→    ctx.fillStyle = col
   125→    ctx.fill()
   126→
   127→    // Ink bleed layer
   128→    ctx.beginPath()
   129→    ctx.arc(p2.x, p2.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   130→    ctx.fillStyle = col
   131→    ctx.fill()
   132→  }
   133→
   134→  const onPointerDown = useCallback(e => {
   135→    e.preventDefault()
   136→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   137→    canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
   138→    drawing.current = true
   139→    lastTime.current = Date.now()
   140→    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
   141→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0) }
   142→    setHasDrawing(true)
   143→
   144→    // Dot for tap
   145→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   146→    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0)
   147→    ctx.beginPath()
   148→    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   149→    ctx.fillStyle = color
   150→    ctx.fill()
   151→  }, [color])
   152→
   153→  const onPointerMove = useCallback(e => {
   154→    if (!drawing.current) return
   155→    e.preventDefault()
   156→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   157→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   158→    const now = Date.now()
   159→    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
   160→    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
   161→    const last = lastPoint.current
   162→    if (!last) return
   163→
   164→    const dx = pos.x - last.x
   165→    const dy = pos.y - last.y
   166→    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
   167→    const velocity = dist / dt // px/ms
   168→    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, velocity)
   169→
   170→    drawBrushSegment(ctx, last, pos, last.width || w, w, color)
   171→
   172→    lastTime.current = now
   173→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: w }
   174→  }, [color])
   175→
   176→  const onPointerUp = useCallback(() => {
   177→    drawing.current = false
   178→    lastPoint.current = null
   179→  }, [])
   180→
   181→  function clear() {
   182→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   183→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   184→    drawBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, height)
   185→    setHasDrawing(false)
   186→  }
   187→
   188→  const bgStyle = darkMode
   189→    ? { background: 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' }
   190→    : { background: 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' }
   191→
   192→  return (
   193→    <div className={`relative w-full ${className}`}>
   194→      <canvas
   195→        ref={canvasRef}
   196→        style={{ width: '100%', height, borderRadius: 14, cursor: 'crosshair', display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', ...bgStyle }}
   197→        onPointerDown={onPointerDown}
   198→        onPointerMove={onPointerMove}
   199→        onPointerUp={onPointerUp}
   200→        onPointerLeave={onPointerUp}
   201→        onPointerCancel={onPointerUp}
   202→      />
   203→      {hasDrawing && (
   204→        <button
   205→          onClick={clear}
   206→          className="absolute top-2 right-2 w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-all"
   207→          style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}
   208→        >✕</button>
   209→      )}
   210→    </div>
   211→  )
   212→}
   213→
```
</details></tool-use>

     2→import { calligraphyChars } from '../../data/exercises'
     3→import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'
     4→
     5→export default function Ex6Calligraphy({ onComplete }) {
     6→  const { penColor, darkMode } = useApp()
     7→  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
     8→  const [charSize, setCharSize] = useState(220)
     9→  const [mode, setMode] = useState('watch')
    10→  const [practiced, setPracticed] = useState([])
    11→  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
    12→  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
    13→  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
    14→  const drawing = useRef(false)
    15→  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
    16→  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
    17→  const current = calligraphyChars[charIdx]
    18→  const canvasH = Math.max(260, charSize + 80)
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    22→    if (!canvas || mode === 'watch') return
    23→    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    24→    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    25→    canvas.width = w * dpr
    26→    canvas.height = canvasH * dpr
    27→    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    28→    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    29→    ctxRef.current = ctx
    30→    paintBackground(ctx, w, canvasH)
    31→  }, [mode, charIdx, darkMode, canvasH])
    32→
    33→  function paintBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    34→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    35→    ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(18,20,30,0.85)' : 'rgba(252,250,246,0.92)'
    36→    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)
    37→    // 米字格
    38→    const gc = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    39→    ctx.strokeStyle = gc; ctx.lineWidth = 1
    40→    ctx.strokeRect(4, 4, w - 8, h - 8)
    41→    ctx.setLineDash([6, 6])
    42→    ctx.beginPath()
    43→    ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 4); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 4)
    44→    ctx.moveTo(4, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h / 2)
    45→    ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([])
    46→    ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    47→    ctx.beginPath()
    48→    ctx.moveTo(4, 4); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h - 4)
    49→    ctx.moveTo(w - 4, 4); ctx.lineTo(4, h - 4)
    50→    ctx.stroke()
    51→    if (mode === 'trace') {
    52→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.76}px "Kaiti SC","STKaiti",serif`
    53→      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    54→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    55→      ctx.fillText(current.char, w / 2, h / 2)
    56→    }
    57→  }
    58→
    59→  function getPos(e) {
    60→    const r = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect()
    61→    return { x: e.clientX - r.left, y: e.clientY - r.top, pressure: e.pressure > 0 ? e.pressure : 0.5 }
    62→  }
    63→
    64→  function brushW(pressure, velocity) {
    65→    const p = Math.max(0.15, pressure)
    66→    const v = Math.max(0.12, 1 - velocity * 0.065)
    67→    return 2 + 26 * p * v
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  const onDown = useCallback(e => {
    71→    e.preventDefault()
    72→    canvasRef.current.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    73→    drawing.current = true
    74→    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    75→    const pos = getPos(e)
    76→    const w = brushW(pos.pressure, 0)
    77→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w }
    78→    setHasDrawing(true)
    79→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    80→    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    81→    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
    82→  }, [penColor])
    83→
    84→  const onMove = useCallback(e => {
    85→    if (!drawing.current || !lastPoint.current) return
    86→    e.preventDefault()
    87→    const now = Date.now()
    88→    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    89→    const pos = getPos(e)
    90→    const last = lastPoint.current
    91→    const dx = pos.x - last.x, dy = pos.y - last.y
    92→    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    93→    if (dist < 0.4) return
    94→    const w2 = brushW(pos.pressure, dist / dt)
    95→    const w1 = last.w
    96→    const nx = -dy / dist, ny = dx / dist
    97→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    98→    ctx.beginPath()
    99→    ctx.moveTo(last.x + nx * w1 / 2, last.y + ny * w1 / 2)
   100→    ctx.lineTo(pos.x + nx * w2 / 2, pos.y + ny * w2 / 2)
   101→    ctx.lineTo(pos.x - nx * w2 / 2, pos.y - ny * w2 / 2)
   102→    ctx.lineTo(last.x - nx * w1 / 2, last.y - ny * w1 / 2)
   103→    ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
   104→    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   105→    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
   106→    lastTime.current = now
   107→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w: w2 }
   108→  }, [penColor])
   109→
   110→  const onUp = useCallback(() => { drawing.current = false; lastPoint.current = null }, [])
   111→
   112→  function clearCanvas() {
   113→    const canvas = canvasRef.current; const ctx = ctxRef.current
   114→    paintBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, canvasH)
   115→    setHasDrawing(false)
   116→  }
   117→

   131→            className="shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"

   146→          <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{current.meaning}</span>
   147→          <span className="ml-auto text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{practiced.length}/{calligraphyChars.length}</span>
   148→        </div>

   150→        {/* BIG reference character */}

   153→            style={{ height: charSize + 60, background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
   154→            <div className="font-kai font-bold select-none"
   155→              style={{ fontSize: charSize, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1, fontFamily: '"Kaiti SC","STKaiti","楷体",serif' }}>
   156→              {current.char}
   157→            </div>

     4→
     5→export function AppProvider({ children }) {
     6→  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false)
     7→  const [penColor, setPenColor] = useState('#1A1A1A')
     8→
     9→  function toggleDark() {

    14→    })

    19→      {children}
    20→    </AppContext.Provider>
    21→  )
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function useApp() { return useContext(AppContext) }

At the bottom, show a big Duolingo-style "继续" button (green #58CC02 with shadow) once the user has answered/acted. Before answering, button is grayed out. '#E8E8E8' : color; }`
- Use this in all drawing calls

### 4. AppContext.jsx — Fix pen color on dark mode toggle
When toggleDark turns ON dark mode, if current penColor is dark (#1A1A1A), switch to '#E8E8E8'.
When turning OFF dark mode, if penColor is '#E8E8E8', switch back to '#1A1A1A'.

In all exercise components, replace hardcoded light-only colors:

For these dark mode checks, use `const { darkMode } = useApp()` in each component.

     1→import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'
     3→
     4→export default function WritingCanvas({
     5→  templateChar = '',
     6→  height = 200,
     7→  showTemplate = false,
     8→  showGrid = false,
     9→  overrideColor = null,
    10→  className = '',
    11→}) {
    12→  const { penColor: ctxColor, darkMode } = useApp()
    13→  const color = overrideColor || ctxColor
    14→
    15→  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
    16→  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
    17→  const drawing = useRef(false)
    18→  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
    19→  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
    20→  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    24→    if (!canvas) return
    25→    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    26→    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    27→    canvas.width = w * dpr
    28→    canvas.height = height * dpr
    29→    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    30→    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    31→    ctxRef.current = ctx
    32→    drawBackground(ctx, w, height)
    33→  }, [height, showGrid, showTemplate, templateChar, darkMode])
    34→
    35→  function drawBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    36→    // Clear
    37→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    38→
    39→    const bgColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)' : 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)'
    40→    ctx.fillStyle = bgColor
    41→    roundRect(ctx, 0, 0, w, h, 12)
    42→    ctx.fill()
    43→
    44→    if (showGrid) {
    45→      const gridColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    46→      ctx.strokeStyle = gridColor
    47→      ctx.lineWidth = 1
    48→      // outer
    49→      ctx.strokeRect(2, 2, w - 4, h - 4)
    50→      // cross (dashed)
    51→      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
    52→      ctx.beginPath()
    53→      ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 2)
    54→      ctx.moveTo(2, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h / 2)
    55→      ctx.stroke()
    56→      ctx.setLineDash([])
    57→      // diagonals light
    58→      ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    59→      ctx.beginPath()
    60→      ctx.moveTo(2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h - 2)
    61→      ctx.moveTo(w - 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(2, h - 2)
    62→      ctx.stroke()
    63→    }
    64→
    65→    if (showTemplate && templateChar) {
    66→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.72}px "Kaiti SC", serif`
    67→      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.07)'
    68→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    69→      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    70→      ctx.fillText(templateChar, w / 2, h / 2)
    71→    }
    72→  }
    73→
    74→  function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
    75→    ctx.beginPath()
    76→    ctx.moveTo(x + r, y)
    77→    ctx.lineTo(x + w - r, y)
    78→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + r)
    79→    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - r)
    80→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - r, y + h)
    81→    ctx.lineTo(x + r, y + h)
    82→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - r)
    83→    ctx.lineTo(x, y + r)
    84→    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + r, y)
    85→    ctx.closePath()
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  function getBrushWidth(pressure, velocity) {
    89→    const min = 1.5
    90→    const max = 20
    91→    const p = pressure > 0 ? Math.max(0.1, pressure) : 0.5
    92→    // slower = wider (like a brush)
    93→    const vFactor = Math.max(0.15, 1 - velocity * 0.06)
    94→    return min + (max - min) * p * vFactor
    95→  }
    96→
    97→  function getPos(e, canvas) {
    98→    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    99→    return {
   100→      x: e.clientX - rect.left,
   101→      y: e.clientY - rect.top,
   102→      pressure: e.pressure ?? 0.5,
   103→    }
   104→  }
   105→
   106→  function drawBrushSegment(ctx, p1, p2, w1, w2, col) {
   107→    if (!p1 || !p2) return
   108→    const dx = p2.x - p1.x
   109→    const dy = p2.y - p1.y
   110→    const len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
   111→    if (len < 0.5) return
   112→
   113→    // Perpendicular direction
   114→    const nx = -dy / len
   115→    const ny = dx / len
   116→
   117→    // Draw tapered quad shape
   118→    ctx.beginPath()
   119→    ctx.moveTo(p1.x + nx * w1 / 2, p1.y + ny * w1 / 2)
   120→    ctx.lineTo(p2.x + nx * w2 / 2, p2.y + ny * w2 / 2)
   121→    ctx.lineTo(p2.x - nx * w2 / 2, p2.y - ny * w2 / 2)
   122→    ctx.lineTo(p1.x - nx * w1 / 2, p1.y - ny * w1 / 2)
   123→    ctx.closePath()
   124→    ctx.fillStyle = col
   125→    ctx.fill()
   126→
   127→    // Ink bleed layer
   128→    ctx.beginPath()
   129→    ctx.arc(p2.x, p2.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   130→    ctx.fillStyle = col
   131→    ctx.fill()
   132→  }
   133→
   134→  const onPointerDown = useCallback(e => {
   135→    e.preventDefault()
   136→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   137→    canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
   138→    drawing.current = true
   139→    lastTime.current = Date.now()
   140→    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
   141→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0) }
   142→    setHasDrawing(true)
   143→
   144→    // Dot for tap
   145→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   146→    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0)
   147→    ctx.beginPath()
   148→    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   149→    ctx.fillStyle = color
   150→    ctx.fill()
   151→  }, [color])
   152→
   153→  const onPointerMove = useCallback(e => {
   154→    if (!drawing.current) return
   155→    e.preventDefault()
   156→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   157→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   158→    const now = Date.now()
   159→    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
   160→    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
   161→    const last = lastPoint.current
   162→    if (!last) return
   163→
   164→    const dx = pos.x - last.x
   165→    const dy = pos.y - last.y
   166→    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
   167→    const velocity = dist / dt // px/ms
   168→    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, velocity)
   169→
   170→    drawBrushSegment(ctx, last, pos, last.width || w, w, color)
   171→
   172→    lastTime.current = now
   173→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: w }
   174→  }, [color])
   175→
   176→  const onPointerUp = useCallback(() => {
   177→    drawing.current = false
   178→    lastPoint.current = null
   179→  }, [])
   180→
   181→  function clear() {
   182→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
   183→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
   184→    drawBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, height)
   185→    setHasDrawing(false)
   186→  }
   187→
   188→  const bgStyle = darkMode
   189→    ? { background: 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' }
   190→    : { background: 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' }
   191→
   192→  return (
   193→    <div className={`relative w-full ${className}`}>
   194→      <canvas
   195→        ref={canvasRef}
   196→        style={{ width: '100%', height, borderRadius: 14, cursor: 'crosshair', display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', ...bgStyle }}
   197→        onPointerDown={onPointerDown}
   198→        onPointerMove={onPointerMove}
   199→        onPointerUp={onPointerUp}
   200→        onPointerLeave={onPointerUp}
   201→        onPointerCancel={onPointerUp}
   202→      />
   203→      {hasDrawing && (
   204→        <button
   205→          onClick={clear}
   206→          className="absolute top-2 right-2 w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-all"
   207→          style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}
   208→        >✕</button>
   209→      )}
   210→    </div>
   211→  )
   212→}
   213→

     1→import { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→const AppContext = createContext({})
     4→
     5→export function AppProvider({ children }) {
     6→  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false)
     7→  const [penColor, setPenColor] = useState('#1A1A1A')
     8→
     9→  function toggleDark() {
    10→    setDarkMode(d => {
    11→      const next = !d
    12→      document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', next)
    13→      return next
    14→    })
    15→  }
    16→
    17→  return (
    18→    <AppContext.Provider value={{ darkMode, toggleDark, penColor, setPenColor }}>
    19→      {children}
    20→    </AppContext.Provider>
    21→  )
    22→}
    23→
    24→export function useApp() { return useContext(AppContext) }
    25→

    46→                </div>

    50→        </div>

    47→            )}
    48→          </div>
    49→        )

    52→      <div className="flex gap-3">

     1→import { useState } from 'react'
     2→import { pauseData } from '../../data/exercises'
     3→
     4→export default function Ex3Pause({ onComplete }) {
     5→  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState({})
     6→  const allAnswered = pauseData.every((_, i) => answers[i] !== undefined)
     7→
     8→  function speak(text) {
     9→    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    10→    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text.replace(/\//g, '，'))
    11→    u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.75
    12→    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
    13→  }
    14→
    15→  return (
    16→    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
    17→      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
    18→        <p className="text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>📍 断句与朗读节奏</p>
    19→        <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>选出正确答案，点击选项可听朗读</p>
    20→      </div>
    21→
    22→      {pauseData.map((item, qi) => (
    23→        <div key={qi} className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
    24→          <p className="font-kai text-lg font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {item.q}</p>
    25→          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
    26→            {item.options.map((opt, oi) => {
    27→              const chosen = answers[qi] === oi
    28→              const isCorrect = oi === item.answer
    29→              const showResult = answers[qi] !== undefined
    30→              return (
    31→                <button key={oi}
    32→                  onClick={() => { setAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [qi]: oi })); speak(opt) }}
    33→                  className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all font-kai"
    34→                  style={
    35→                    !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
    36→                    : chosen && isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
    37→                    : chosen ? { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
    38→                    : isCorrect ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
    39→                    : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
    40→                  }>
    41→                  {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
    42→                  {!showResult && <span className="float-right">🔊</span>}
    43→                </button>
    44→              )
    45→            })}
    46→          </div>
    47→          {answers[qi] !== undefined && (
    48→            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-2 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
    49→              💡 {item.explanation}
    50→            </p>
    51→          )}
    52→        </div>
    53→      ))}
    54→
    55→      {allAnswered && (
    56→        <button onClick={onComplete}
    57→          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg animate-pop active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
    58→          style={{ background: '#FF9600', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC7700' }}>
    59→          完成断句关 →
    60→        </button>
    61→      )}
    62→    </div>
    63→  )
    64→}
    65→

    27→              className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 text-lg"
    28→              style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>🔊</button>
    29→          </div>
    30→          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
    31→            {para.notes.map((n, i) => (
    32→              <span key={i} className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>📌 {n}</span>
    33→            ))}
    34→          </div>
    35→          <button onClick={() => setShowTrans(p => p.includes(para.id) ? p.filter(x => x !== para.id) : [...p, para.id])}
    36→            className="text-sm py-2 rounded-xl transition-all"
    37→            style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #FF4B4B', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>

    40→          {showTrans.includes(para.id) && (

    43→        </div>
    44→      ))}
    45→
    46→      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-5">
    47→        <p className="font-kai text-lg font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>阅读练习</p>
    48→        {readingData.questions.map((q, qi) => (
    49→          <div key={qi} className="flex flex-col gap-2">
    50→            <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {q.q}</p>
    51→            <WritingCanvas height={q.type === 'open' ? 160 : 90} showGrid />
    52→            {(q.answer || q.reference) && (
    53→              <details>
    54→                <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: '#FF4B4B' }}>查看参考答案</summary>
    55→                <div className="mt-2 text-base px-3 py-2 rounded-xl font-kai" style={{ background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000' }}>
    56→                  {q.reference || q.answer}
    57→                </div>
    58→              </details>
    59→            )}
    60→          </div>
    61→        ))}
    62→      </div>
    63→
    64→      <button onClick={onComplete}
    65→        className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
    66→        style={{ background: '#FF4B4B', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC0000' }}>
    67→        完成拓展关 →
    68→      </button>
    69→    </div>
    70→  )
    71→}
    72→

     1→import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { calligraphyChars } from '../../data/exercises'
     3→import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'
     4→
     5→export default function Ex6Calligraphy({ onComplete }) {
     6→  const { penColor, darkMode } = useApp()
     7→  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
     8→  const [charSize, setCharSize] = useState(220)
     9→  const [mode, setMode] = useState('watch')
    10→  const [practiced, setPracticed] = useState([])
    11→  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
    12→  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
    13→  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
    14→  const drawing = useRef(false)
    15→  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
    16→  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
    17→  const current = calligraphyChars[charIdx]
    18→  const canvasH = Math.max(260, charSize + 80)
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    22→    if (!canvas || mode === 'watch') return
    23→    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    24→    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    25→    canvas.width = w * dpr
    26→    canvas.height = canvasH * dpr
    27→    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    28→    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    29→    ctxRef.current = ctx
    30→    paintBackground(ctx, w, canvasH)
    31→  }, [mode, charIdx, darkMode, canvasH])
    32→
    33→  function paintBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    34→    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    35→    ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(18,20,30,0.85)' : 'rgba(252,250,246,0.92)'
    36→    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)
    37→    // 米字格
    38→    const gc = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    39→    ctx.strokeStyle = gc; ctx.lineWidth = 1
    40→    ctx.strokeRect(4, 4, w - 8, h - 8)
    41→    ctx.setLineDash([6, 6])
    42→    ctx.beginPath()
    43→    ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 4); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 4)
    44→    ctx.moveTo(4, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h / 2)
    45→    ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([])
    46→    ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    47→    ctx.beginPath()
    48→    ctx.moveTo(4, 4); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h - 4)
    49→    ctx.moveTo(w - 4, 4); ctx.lineTo(4, h - 4)
    50→    ctx.stroke()
    51→    if (mode === 'trace') {
    52→      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.76}px "Kaiti SC","STKaiti",serif`
    53→      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    54→      ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    55→      ctx.fillText(current.char, w / 2, h / 2)
    56→    }
    57→  }
    58→
    59→  function getPos(e) {
    60→    const r = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect()
    61→    return { x: e.clientX - r.left, y: e.clientY - r.top, pressure: e.pressure > 0 ? e.pressure : 0.5 }
    62→  }
    63→
    64→  function brushW(pressure, velocity) {
    65→    const p = Math.max(0.15, pressure)
    66→    const v = Math.max(0.12, 1 - velocity * 0.065)
    67→    return 2 + 26 * p * v
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  const onDown = useCallback(e => {
    71→    e.preventDefault()
    72→    canvasRef.current.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    73→    drawing.current = true
    74→    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    75→    const pos = getPos(e)
    76→    const w = brushW(pos.pressure, 0)
    77→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w }
    78→    setHasDrawing(true)
    79→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    80→    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    81→    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
    82→  }, [penColor])
    83→
    84→  const onMove = useCallback(e => {
    85→    if (!drawing.current || !lastPoint.current) return
    86→    e.preventDefault()
    87→    const now = Date.now()
    88→    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    89→    const pos = getPos(e)
    90→    const last = lastPoint.current
    91→    const dx = pos.x - last.x, dy = pos.y - last.y
    92→    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    93→    if (dist < 0.4) return
    94→    const w2 = brushW(pos.pressure, dist / dt)
    95→    const w1 = last.w
    96→    const nx = -dy / dist, ny = dx / dist
    97→    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    98→    ctx.beginPath()
    99→    ctx.moveTo(last.x + nx * w1 / 2, last.y + ny * w1 / 2)
   100→    ctx.lineTo(pos.x + nx * w2 / 2, pos.y + ny * w2 / 2)
   101→    ctx.lineTo(pos.x - nx * w2 / 2, pos.y - ny * w2 / 2)
   102→    ctx.lineTo(last.x - nx * w1 / 2, last.y - ny * w1 / 2)
   103→    ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
   104→    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
   105→    ctx.fillStyle = penColor; ctx.fill()
   106→    lastTime.current = now
   107→    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w: w2 }
   108→  }, [penColor])
   109→
   110→  const onUp = useCallback(() => { drawing.current = false; lastPoint.current = null }, [])
   111→
   112→  function clearCanvas() {
   113→    const canvas = canvasRef.current; const ctx = ctxRef.current
   114→    paintBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, canvasH)
   115→    setHasDrawing(false)
   116→  }
   117→
   118→  function next() {
   119→    setPracticed(p => [...new Set([...p, charIdx])])
   120→    if (charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1) {
   121→      setCharIdx(i => i + 1); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false)
   122→    } else { onComplete() }
   123→  }
   124→
   125→  return (
   126→    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
   127→      {/* Char strip */}
   128→      <div className="px-5 pt-5 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
   129→        {calligraphyChars.map((c, i) => (
   130→          <button key={i} onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false) }}
   131→            className="shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
   132→            style={i === charIdx
   133→              ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 3px 0 #B07A00', transform: 'scale(1.06)' }
   134→              : practiced.includes(i) ? { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }
   135→              : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
   136→            {practiced.includes(i) ? '✓' : c.char}
   137→          </button>
   138→        ))}
   139→      </div>
   140→
   141→      <div className="px-5 flex flex-col gap-4 pb-8">
   142→        {/* Info row */}
   143→        <div className="flex items-baseline gap-3">
   144→          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 56, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1 }}>{current.char}</span>
   145→          <span className="text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{current.pinyin}</span>
   146→          <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{current.meaning}</span>
   147→          <span className="ml-auto text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{practiced.length}/{calligraphyChars.length}</span>
   148→        </div>
   149→
   150→        {/* BIG reference character */}
   151→        {mode === 'watch' && (
   152→          <div className="glass rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pop"
   153→            style={{ height: charSize + 60, background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
   154→            <div className="font-kai font-bold select-none"
   155→              style={{ fontSize: charSize, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1, fontFamily: '"Kaiti SC","STKaiti","楷体",serif' }}>
   156→              {current.char}
   157→            </div>
   158→          </div>
   159→        )}
   160→
   161→        {/* Size slider */}
   162→        <div className="glass rounded-2xl px-5 py-3.5 flex items-center gap-4">
   163→          <span className="font-kai" style={{ fontSize: 18, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>小</span>
   164→          <input type="range" min="120" max="340" value={charSize}
   165→            onChange={e => setCharSize(Number(e.target.value))}
   166→            className="flex-1 cursor-pointer" style={{ accentColor: '#E9A825' }} />
   167→          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 32, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>大</span>
   168→          <span className="text-sm w-12 text-right" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{charSize}</span>
   169→        </div>
   170→
   171→        {/* Mode tabs */}
   172→        <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
   173→          {[['watch','👁 看', '观察字形'], ['trace','🖊 描', '描红练习'], ['free','✍️ 写', '独立书写']].map(([m, label, tip]) => (
   174→            <button key={m} onClick={() => { setMode(m); setHasDrawing(false) }}
   175→              className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all flex flex-col items-center"
   176→              style={mode === m ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
   177→              <span>{label}</span>
   178→              <span className="text-xs font-normal opacity-75">{tip}</span>
   179→            </button>
   180→          ))}
   181→        </div>
   182→
   183→        {/* Canvas */}
   184→        {(mode === 'trace' || mode === 'free') && (
   185→          <div className="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden">
   186→            <canvas ref={canvasRef}
   187→              style={{ width: '100%', height: canvasH, display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', borderRadius: 16, border: '2px solid var(--card-border)', cursor: 'crosshair' }}
   188→              onPointerDown={onDown} onPointerMove={onMove}
   189→              onPointerUp={onUp} onPointerLeave={onUp} onPointerCancel={onUp} />
   190→            {hasDrawing && (

   192→                className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm shadow-lg"
   193→                style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>✕</button>
   194→            )}
   195→            {mode === 'trace' && (

   198→            )}
   199→          </div>
   200→        )}
   201→
   202→        <button onClick={next}

   204→          style={{ background: '#E9A825', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #B07A00' }}>
   205→          {charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1 ? '写好了，下一字 →' : '完成书写关 🎉'}

   208→    </div>

   210→}

import { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react'

const AppContext = createContext({})

export function AppProvider({ children }) {
  const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false)
  const [penColor, setPenColor] = useState('#1A1A1A')

  function toggleDark() {
    setDarkMode(d => {
      const next = !d
      document.documentElement.classList.toggle('dark', next)
      // Fix pen color on dark mode toggle
      if (next) {
        setPenColor(c => c === '#1A1A1A' ? '#E8E8E8' : c)
      } else {
        setPenColor(c => c === '#E8E8E8' ? '#1A1A1A' : c)
      }
      return next
    })
  }

  return (
    <AppContext.Provider value={{ darkMode, toggleDark, penColor, setPenColor }}>
      {children}
    </AppContext.Provider>
  )
}

export function useApp() { return useContext(AppContext) }

import { useRef, useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'

function getEffectiveColor(color, darkMode) {
  if (!darkMode) return color
  const hex = color.replace('#', '')
  const r = parseInt(hex.substr(0, 2), 16)
  const g = parseInt(hex.substr(2, 2), 16)
  const b = parseInt(hex.substr(4, 2), 16)
  const lum = (0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b) / 255
  return lum < 0.3 ? '#E8E8E8' : color
}

export default function WritingCanvas({
  templateChar = '',
  height = 200,
  square = false,
  showTemplate = false,
  showGrid = false,
  overrideColor = null,
  className = '',
}) {
  const { penColor: ctxColor, darkMode } = useApp()
  const color = getEffectiveColor(overrideColor || ctxColor, darkMode)

  const containerRef = useRef(null)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
  const drawing = useRef(false)
  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
  const [canvasHeight, setCanvasHeight] = useState(height)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!square) {
      setCanvasHeight(height)
      return
    }
    function updateSquare() {
      if (containerRef.current) {
        const w = containerRef.current.offsetWidth
        setCanvasHeight(w)
      }
    }
    updateSquare()
    const ro = new ResizeObserver(updateSquare)
    if (containerRef.current) ro.observe(containerRef.current)
    return () => ro.disconnect()
  }, [square, height])

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas) return
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    const h = canvasHeight
    canvas.width = w * dpr
    canvas.height = h * dpr
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    ctxRef.current = ctx
    drawBackground(ctx, w, h)
  }, [canvasHeight, showGrid, showTemplate, templateChar, darkMode])

  function drawBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)

    const bgColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)' : 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)'
    ctx.fillStyle = bgColor
    roundRect(ctx, 0, 0, w, h, 12)
    ctx.fill()

    if (showGrid) {
      const gridColor = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
      ctx.strokeStyle = gridColor
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.strokeRect(2, 2, w - 4, h - 4)
      ctx.setLineDash([5, 5])
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 2)
      ctx.moveTo(2, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h / 2)
      ctx.stroke()
      ctx.setLineDash([])
      ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(2, 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 2, h - 2)
      ctx.moveTo(w - 2, 2); ctx.lineTo(2, h - 2)
      ctx.stroke()
    }

    if (showTemplate && templateChar) {
      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.72}px "Kaiti SC", serif`
      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.07)'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'
      ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
      ctx.fillText(templateChar, w / 2, h / 2)
    }
  }

  function roundRect(ctx, x, y, w, h, r) {
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(x + r, y)
    ctx.lineTo(x + w - r, y)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + r)
    ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - r)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - r, y + h)
    ctx.lineTo(x + r, y + h)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - r)
    ctx.lineTo(x, y + r)
    ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + r, y)
    ctx.closePath()
  }

  function getBrushWidth(pressure, velocity) {
    const min = 1.5
    const max = 20
    const p = pressure > 0 ? Math.max(0.1, pressure) : 0.5
    const vFactor = Math.max(0.15, 1 - velocity * 0.06)
    return min + (max - min) * p * vFactor
  }

  function getPos(e, canvas) {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
    return {
      x: e.clientX - rect.left,
      y: e.clientY - rect.top,
      pressure: e.pressure ?? 0.5,
    }
  }

  function drawBrushSegment(ctx, p1, p2, w1, w2, col) {
    if (!p1 || !p2) return
    const dx = p2.x - p1.x
    const dy = p2.y - p1.y
    const len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    if (len < 0.5) return

    const nx = -dy / len
    const ny = dx / len

    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(p1.x + nx * w1 / 2, p1.y + ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x + nx * w2 / 2, p2.y + ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(p2.x - nx * w2 / 2, p2.y - ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(p1.x - nx * w1 / 2, p1.y - ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.closePath()
    ctx.fillStyle = col
    ctx.fill()

    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(p2.x, p2.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = col
    ctx.fill()
  }

  const onPointerDown = useCallback(e => {
    e.preventDefault()
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    canvas.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    drawing.current = true
    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0) }
    setHasDrawing(true)

    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, 0)
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = color
    ctx.fill()
  }, [color])

  const onPointerMove = useCallback(e => {
    if (!drawing.current) return
    e.preventDefault()
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    const now = Date.now()
    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    const pos = getPos(e, canvas)
    const last = lastPoint.current
    if (!last) return

    const dx = pos.x - last.x
    const dy = pos.y - last.y
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    const velocity = dist / dt
    const w = getBrushWidth(pos.pressure, velocity)

    drawBrushSegment(ctx, last, pos, last.width || w, w, color)

    lastTime.current = now
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, width: w }
  }, [color])

  const onPointerUp = useCallback(() => {
    drawing.current = false
    lastPoint.current = null
  }, [])

  function clear() {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    drawBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, canvasHeight)
    setHasDrawing(false)
  }

  const bgStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: 'rgba(25,28,40,0.6)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)' }
    : { background: 'rgba(250,248,244,0.8)', border: '1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' }

  return (
    <div ref={containerRef} className={`relative w-full ${className}`}>
      <canvas
        ref={canvasRef}
        style={{ width: '100%', height: canvasHeight, borderRadius: 14, cursor: 'crosshair', display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', ...bgStyle }}
        onPointerDown={onPointerDown}
        onPointerMove={onPointerMove}
        onPointerUp={onPointerUp}
        onPointerLeave={onPointerUp}
        onPointerCancel={onPointerUp}
      />
      {hasDrawing && (
        <button
          onClick={clear}
          className="absolute top-2 right-2 w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-all"
          style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}
        >✕</button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
