```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { useApp } from '../context/AppContext'
import { exercises } from '../data/exercises'
import Ex1Words from './exercises/Ex1Words'
import Ex2Meaning from './exercises/Ex2Meaning'
import Ex3Pause from './exercises/Ex3Pause'
import Ex4Comprehension from './exercises/Ex4Comprehension'
import Ex5Reading from './exercises/Ex5Reading'
import Ex6Calligraphy from './exercises/Ex6Calligraphy'

const COMPS = {
  words: Ex1Words, meaning: Ex2Meaning, pause: Ex3Pause,
  comprehension: Ex4Comprehension, reading: Ex5Reading, calligraphy: Ex6Calligraphy,
}

// Winding path offsets from left (as percentage), alternating like Duolingo
const NODE_OFFSETS = ['20%', '55%', '72%', '25%', '50%', '68%']

export default function ExerciseHub({ onBack }) {
  const { darkMode } = useApp()
  const [active, setActive] = useState(null)
  const [done, setDone] = useState([])

  if (active) {
    const Comp = COMPS[active.id]
    return (
      <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
        <div className="glass-strong sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 pl-16">
          <button onClick={() => setActive(null)} className="glass w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>←</button>
          <span className="text-2xl">{active.emoji}</span>
          <span className="font-kai font-bold text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{active.title}</span>
          <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{active.desc}</span>
        </div>
        <Comp onComplete={() => { setDone(p => [...new Set([...p, active.id])]); setActive(null) }} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="glass-strong sticky top-0 z-40 flex items-center gap-3 px-5 py-3.5 pl-16">
        <button onClick={onBack} className="glass w-9 h-9 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>←</button>
        <span className="font-kai font-bold text-lg" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>练习园</span>
        <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{done.length}/6 完成</span>
      </div>

      {/* Top counter */}
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-5 pt-6 pb-2 text-center">
        <p className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>文言文二则 · 全套练习</p>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-3">
          {exercises.map((ex, i) => (
            <div key={ex.id} className="w-6 h-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold transition-all"
              style={done.includes(ex.id)
                ? { background: '#58CC02', color: 'white' }
                : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
              {done.includes(ex.id) ? '✓' : i + 1}
            </div>
          ))}
          <span className="text-sm ml-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{done.length}/6</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Winding path */}
      <div className="max-w-sm mx-auto relative pb-16 pt-4" style={{ minHeight: 600 }}>
        {/* SVG path connecting all nodes */}
        <svg
          style={{ position: 'absolute', top: 0, left: 0, width: '100%', height: '100%', pointerEvents: 'none' }}
          preserveAspectRatio="none"
        >
          <PathLine exercises={exercises} offsets={NODE_OFFSETS} />
        </svg>

        {/* Nodes */}
        {exercises.map((ex, i) => {
          const isDone = done.includes(ex.id)
          const isNext = !isDone && done.length === i
          const leftOffset = NODE_OFFSETS[i]
          const topOffset = i * 110 + 20

          return (
            <div
              key={ex.id}
              style={{
                position: 'absolute',
                top: topOffset,
                left: leftOffset,
                transform: 'translateX(-50%)',
                display: 'flex',
                flexDirection: 'column',
                alignItems: 'center',
                gap: 6,
                zIndex: 2,
              }}
            >
              <button
                onClick={() => setActive(ex)}
                className={`transition-all active:scale-90 ${isNext ? 'animate-bounce' : ''}`}
                style={{
                  width: 72,
                  height: 72,
                  borderRadius: '50%',
                  display: 'flex',
                  alignItems: 'center',
                  justifyContent: 'center',
                  fontSize: 28,
                  fontWeight: 'bold',
                  border: isDone ? '3px solid #46A302' : isNext ? `3px solid ${ex.color}` : `2px solid ${ex.color}55`,
                  background: isDone
                    ? (darkMode ? '#1A3300' : '#D7FFB8')
                    : isNext
                      ? ex.color
                      : (darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'),
                  boxShadow: isDone
                    ? '0 4px 0 #46A302'
                    : isNext
                      ? `0 4px 0 ${ex.color}88`
                      : 'none',
                  color: isDone ? '#46A302' : isNext ? 'white' : ex.color,
                }}
              >
                {isDone ? '✓' : ex.emoji}
              </button>
              <div style={{ textAlign: 'center', maxWidth: 90 }}>
                <div className="font-kai font-bold text-sm" style={{ color: isDone ? '#58CC02' : ex.color }}>{ex.title}</div>
                <div className="text-xs mt-0.5" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{ex.desc}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )
        })}

        {/* Spacer to ensure container height covers all nodes */}
        <div style={{ height: exercises.length * 110 + 120 }} />
      </div>

      {/* All done celebration */}
      {done.length === 6 && (
        <div className="max-w-sm mx-auto px-5 pb-10">
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl p-6 text-center animate-pop">
            <div className="text-5xl mb-3">🏆</div>
            <p className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>全部完成！</p>
            <p className="text-base mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>你已掌握本课所有练习</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

// SVG path component connecting nodes with a dashed curved line
function PathLine({ exercises, offsets }) {
  // We need to compute approximate node centers as percentages
  // Container is max-w-sm (~384px), nodes at top: i*110+20, left offsets are percentages
  const nodeCount = exercises.length
  if (nodeCount < 2) return null

  // Build path points - these are relative to the SVG container
  // Since SVG uses preserveAspectRatio="none" and fills the div, we work in %
  const pts = exercises.map((_, i) => {
    const leftPct = parseFloat(offsets[i])
    const topPx = i * 110 + 56 // center of circle (20 + 72/2 = 56)
    return { x: leftPct, y: topPx }
  })

  // Build a smooth path using quadratic bezier curves between points
  let d = `M ${pts[0].x}% ${pts[0].y}`
  for (let i = 1; i < pts.length; i++) {
    const prev = pts[i - 1]
    const curr = pts[i]
    const mx = (prev.x + curr.x) / 2
    const my = (prev.y + curr.y) / 2
    d += ` Q ${prev.x}% ${my} ${mx}% ${my}`
    d += ` Q ${curr.x}% ${my} ${curr.x}% ${curr.y}`
  }

  return (
    <path
      d={d}
      fill="none"
      stroke="var(--text3)"
      strokeWidth="3"
      strokeDasharray="8 6"
      opacity="0.4"
    />
  )
}

```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { wordsData } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

// Steps:
// 0: intro
// 1-4: pronunciation items (4 total)
// 5-9: groupWords (5 total)
// 10-13: pinyin items (4 total)
// 14: complete

const PRON_START = 1
const GW_START = PRON_START + wordsData.pronunciation.length   // 5
const PY_START = GW_START + wordsData.groupWords.length          // 10
const TOTAL_STEPS = PY_START + wordsData.pinyin.length           // 14

function ContinueBtn({ enabled, onClick, label = '继续' }) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={enabled ? onClick : undefined}
      className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-lg transition-all"
      style={enabled
        ? { background: '#58CC02', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #46A302' }
        : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', cursor: 'default' }
      }
    >{label}</button>
  )
}

function ProgressDots({ current, total }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex gap-1.5 items-center justify-center flex-wrap">
      {Array.from({ length: total }).map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="h-2 rounded-full transition-all"
          style={{
            width: i === current ? 16 : 8,
            background: i < current ? '#58CC02' : i === current ? '#1CB0F6' : 'var(--bg2)',
          }} />
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

export default function Ex1Words({ onComplete }) {
  const { darkMode } = useApp()
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [pronAnswers, setPronAnswers] = useState({})
  const [gwHasDrawing, setGwHasDrawing] = useState({})

  function next() {
    if (step >= TOTAL_STEPS - 1) {
      onComplete()
    } else {
      setStep(s => s + 1)
    }
  }

  // Dark mode color helpers
  const correctStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#1A3300', color: '#58CC02', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
    : { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
  const wrongStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#3D0000', color: '#FF6B6B', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
    : { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }

  // Step 0: Intro
  if (step === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-8 flex flex-col gap-6 items-center">
        <div className="text-6xl">🔤</div>
        <h2 className="font-kai text-3xl font-bold" style={{ color: '#1CB0F6' }}>字词关</h2>
        <p className="text-base text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
          本关包含三个部分：<br />
          字音辨析 · 组词练习 · 拼音写词
        </p>
        <div className="w-full mt-4">
          <button onClick={next}
            className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
            style={{ background: '#1CB0F6', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #0091D4' }}>
            字音辨析 开始 →
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Steps 1-4: Pronunciation items
  if (step >= PRON_START && step < GW_START) {
    const i = step - PRON_START
    const item = wordsData.pronunciation[i]
    const answered = pronAnswers[i]

    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <ProgressDots current={step - 1} total={TOTAL_STEPS - 1} />
        <p className="text-xs text-center font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>字音辨析 {i + 1}/{wordsData.pronunciation.length}</p>

        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>判断读音是否正确</p>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
            <span className="font-kai text-2xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{item.sentence}</span>
            <span className="text-sm px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: '#1CB0F6' }}>标注：{item.given}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex gap-3">
          <button onClick={() => setPronAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [i]: 'correct' }))}
            className="flex-1 py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-base transition-all"
            style={answered === 'correct' ? correctStyle : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }}>
            ✓ 正确
          </button>
          <button onClick={() => setPronAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [i]: 'wrong' }))}
            className="flex-1 py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-base transition-all"
            style={answered === 'wrong' ? wrongStyle : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }}>
            ✗ 有误
          </button>
        </div>

        {answered && (
          <div className="glass rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 animate-pop" style={{ color: item.correct ? '#58CC02' : '#FF4B4B' }}>
            {item.correct ? '✓ 读音正确！' : `✗ 正确读音是：${item.pinyin}`}
          </div>
        )}

        <ContinueBtn enabled={!!answered} onClick={next} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Steps 5-9: Group words
  if (step >= GW_START && step < PY_START) {
    const i = step - GW_START
    const item = wordsData.groupWords[i]
    const hasDrawing = gwHasDrawing[i]

    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <ProgressDots current={step - 1} total={TOTAL_STEPS - 1} />
        <p className="text-xs text-center font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>组词练习 {i + 1}/{wordsData.groupWords.length}</p>

        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3 animate-pop">
          <div className="text-center font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 72, color: '#1CB0F6', lineHeight: 1 }}>
            {item.char}
          </div>
          <p className="text-sm text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>用 Pencil 写出两个词语</p>
          <WritingCanvas square showGrid />
          {hasDrawing && (
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 pt-2" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)' }}>
              <span className="text-xs" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>参考：</span>
              {item.examples.map(e => (
                <span key={e} className="text-sm px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{e}</span>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <ContinueBtn enabled={true} onClick={next} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Steps 10-13: Pinyin items
  if (step >= PY_START && step < TOTAL_STEPS) {
    const i = step - PY_START
    const item = wordsData.pinyin[i]

    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        <ProgressDots current={step - 1} total={TOTAL_STEPS - 1} />
        <p className="text-xs text-center font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>拼音写词 {i + 1}/{wordsData.pinyin.length}</p>

        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>看拼音，用 Pencil 写汉字词语</p>
          <div className="text-2xl font-medium text-center py-2 tracking-widest" style={{ color: '#1CB0F6' }}>{item.py}</div>
          <WritingCanvas square showGrid />
          <details>
            <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>查看答案</summary>
            <span className="font-kai text-base ml-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{item.answer}</span>
          </details>
        </div>

        <ContinueBtn enabled={true} onClick={step < TOTAL_STEPS - 1 ? next : undefined}
          label={step < TOTAL_STEPS - 1 ? '继续' : '完成字词关 →'} />
        {step === TOTAL_STEPS - 1 && (
          <button onClick={onComplete}
            className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
            style={{ background: '#1CB0F6', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #0091D4' }}>
            完成字词关 →
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    )
  }

  return null
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { meaningData } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

// Flatten all group.items into a flat list of steps
// Each step = { groupIdx, itemIdx, source, sentence, word, hint }
const STEPS = meaningData.flatMap((group, gi) =>
  group.items.map((item, ii) => ({ groupIdx: gi, itemIdx: ii, source: group.source, sentence: group.sentence, ...item }))
)
const TOTAL = STEPS.length

function ContinueBtn({ onClick, label = '继续' }) {
  return (
    <button onClick={onClick}
      className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
      style={{ background: '#58CC02', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #46A302' }}>
      {label}
    </button>
  )
}

export default function Ex2Meaning({ onComplete }) {
  const { darkMode } = useApp()
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [revealed, setRevealed] = useState([])

  const current = STEPS[step]

  function next() {
    if (step >= TOTAL - 1) {
      onComplete()
    } else {
      setStep(s => s + 1)
    }
  }

  const sourceStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#1A3300', color: '#58CC02' }
    : { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }

  const answerStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#1A3300', color: '#58CC02' }
    : { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      {/* Progress bar */}
      <div className="flex gap-1.5 items-center">
        {STEPS.map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="flex-1 h-2.5 rounded-full transition-all"
            style={{ background: i < step ? '#58CC02' : i === step ? '#58CC0288' : 'var(--bg2)' }} />
        ))}
        <span className="text-sm shrink-0 ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{step + 1}/{TOTAL}</span>
      </div>

      {/* Source tag */}
      <span className="self-start text-xs px-3 py-1 rounded-full font-medium" style={sourceStyle}>
        {current.source}
      </span>

      {/* Sentence */}
      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
        <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{current.sentence}</p>
      </div>

      {/* Word + canvas */}
      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <span className="font-kai text-4xl font-bold" style={{ color: '#58CC02' }}>{current.word}</span>
          <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>的意思是——</span>
        </div>
        <WritingCanvas square showGrid />
        {!revealed.includes(step) ? (
          <button onClick={() => setRevealed(p => [...p, step])}
            className="text-sm py-2 rounded-xl transition-all"
            style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #58CC02', color: '#58CC02' }}>
            查看答案
          </button>
        ) : (
          <div className="text-base py-2 px-3 rounded-xl font-kai animate-pop" style={answerStyle}>
            {current.hint}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <ContinueBtn onClick={next} label={step >= TOTAL - 1 ? '完成字义关 ✓' : '继续'} />
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { pauseData } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'

const TOTAL = pauseData.length

function ContinueBtn({ enabled, onClick, label = '继续' }) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={enabled ? onClick : undefined}
      className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-lg transition-all"
      style={enabled
        ? { background: '#FF9600', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC7700' }
        : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', cursor: 'default' }
      }
    >{label}</button>
  )
}

export default function Ex3Pause({ onComplete }) {
  const { darkMode } = useApp()
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [answers, setAnswers] = useState({})

  const item = pauseData[step]
  const answered = answers[step] !== undefined

  function speak(text) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text.replace(/\//g, '，'))
    u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.75
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  function next() {
    if (step >= TOTAL - 1) {
      onComplete()
    } else {
      setStep(s => s + 1)
    }
  }

  const correctStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#1A3300', color: '#58CC02', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
    : { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
  const wrongStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#3D0000', color: '#FF6B6B', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
    : { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      {/* Progress dots */}
      <div className="flex gap-2 items-center justify-center">
        {pauseData.map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-2 rounded-full transition-all"
            style={{
              width: i === step ? 20 : 10,
              background: i < step ? '#FF9600' : i === step ? '#FF9600' : 'var(--bg2)',
            }} />
        ))}
        <span className="text-sm ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{step + 1}/{TOTAL}</span>
      </div>

      {/* Question card */}
      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
          <span className="text-lg">📍</span>
          <p className="font-kai text-base font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{step + 1}. {item.q}</p>
        </div>
        <p className="text-xs" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>点击选项可听朗读</p>

        <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 mt-1">
          {item.options.map((opt, oi) => {
            const chosen = answers[step] === oi
            const isCorrect = oi === item.answer
            const showResult = answered
            return (
              <button key={oi}
                onClick={() => { setAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [step]: oi })); speak(opt) }}
                className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all font-kai"
                style={
                  !showResult
                    ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                    : chosen && isCorrect ? correctStyle
                    : chosen ? wrongStyle
                    : isCorrect ? correctStyle
                    : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                }>
                {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                {!showResult && <span className="float-right">🔊</span>}
              </button>
            )
          })}
        </div>

        {answered && (
          <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-3 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
            💡 {item.explanation}
          </p>
        )}
      </div>

      <ContinueBtn
        enabled={answered}
        onClick={next}
        label={step >= TOTAL - 1 ? '完成断句关 →' : '继续'}
      />
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { comprehensionData } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

// Flatten all items into steps
// MC questions: type 'mc' or 'multi-match'
// Sentence analysis questions: type 'sa-choice' or 'sa-write'
const STEPS = []
comprehensionData.multiChoice.forEach((item, qi) => {
  STEPS.push({ kind: item.type === 'multi-match' ? 'multi-match' : 'mc', ...item, qi })
})
comprehensionData.sentenceAnalysis.forEach((block, bi) => {
  block.questions.forEach((q, qi) => {
    STEPS.push({ kind: q.type === 'choice' ? 'sa-choice' : 'sa-write', sentence: block.sentence, bi, qi, ...q })
  })
})
const TOTAL = STEPS.length

function ContinueBtn({ enabled, onClick, label = '继续' }) {
  return (
    <button
      onClick={enabled ? onClick : undefined}
      className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl font-bold text-lg transition-all"
      style={enabled
        ? { background: '#CE82FF', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #9B30D0' }
        : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', cursor: 'default' }
      }
    >{label}</button>
  )
}

export default function Ex4Comprehension({ onComplete }) {
  const { darkMode } = useApp()
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [mcAnswers, setMcAnswers] = useState({})
  const [matchAnswers, setMatchAnswers] = useState({})

  const current = STEPS[step]

  function next() {
    if (step >= TOTAL - 1) {
      onComplete()
    } else {
      setStep(s => s + 1)
    }
  }

  // Dark mode color helpers
  const correctStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#1A3300', color: '#58CC02', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
    : { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00', border: '2px solid #58CC02' }
  const wrongStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#3D0000', color: '#FF6B6B', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
    : { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', border: '2px solid #FF4B4B' }
  const purpleStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#1D0040', color: '#CE82FF', border: '2px solid #CE82FF' }
    : { background: '#EEE4FF', color: '#9B30D0', border: '2px solid #CE82FF' }

  // Progress bar
  const progressBar = (
    <div className="flex gap-1.5 items-center">
      {STEPS.map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="flex-1 h-2 rounded-full transition-all"
          style={{ background: i < step ? '#CE82FF' : i === step ? '#CE82FF88' : 'var(--bg2)' }} />
      ))}
      <span className="text-xs shrink-0 ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{step + 1}/{TOTAL}</span>
    </div>
  )

  // MC question
  if (current.kind === 'mc') {
    const answered = mcAnswers[step] !== undefined
    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        {progressBar}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="font-kai text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{current.q}</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 mt-1">
            {current.options.map((opt, oi) => {
              const chosen = mcAnswers[step] === oi
              const isCorrect = oi === current.answer
              const showResult = answered
              return (
                <button key={oi} onClick={() => !answered && setMcAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [step]: oi }))}
                  className="text-left px-4 py-3.5 rounded-xl text-base transition-all"
                  style={
                    !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                    : chosen && isCorrect ? correctStyle
                    : chosen ? wrongStyle
                    : isCorrect ? correctStyle
                    : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)', border: '2px solid transparent' }
                  }>
                  {showResult && isCorrect ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
                </button>
              )
            })}
          </div>
          {answered && current.explanation && (
            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed pt-2 animate-pop" style={{ borderTop: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>
              💡 {current.explanation}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
        <ContinueBtn enabled={answered} onClick={next} label={step >= TOTAL - 1 ? '完成理解关 →' : '继续'} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Multi-match question
  if (current.kind === 'multi-match') {
    const allAnswered = current.sentences.every((_, si) => matchAnswers[`${step}-${si}`] !== undefined)
    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        {progressBar}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <p className="font-kai text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{current.q}</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 mt-1">
            {current.meanings.map(m => (
              <div key={m.id} className="text-sm px-3 py-2 rounded-xl" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{m.text}</div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {current.sentences.map((s, si) => {
            const key = `${step}-${si}`
            const chosen = matchAnswers[key]
            const showResult = chosen !== undefined
            return (
              <div key={si} className="glass rounded-xl p-3 flex flex-col gap-2">
                <p className="font-kai text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{s.text}</p>
                <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
                  {['a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e'].map(opt => (
                    <button key={opt}
                      onClick={() => !showResult && setMatchAnswers(p => ({ ...p, [key]: opt }))}
                      className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all"
                      style={
                        !showResult ? { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
                        : chosen === opt && opt === s.answer ? correctStyle
                        : chosen === opt ? wrongStyle
                        : opt === s.answer ? correctStyle
                        : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }
                      }>{opt}</button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )
          })}
        </div>
        <ContinueBtn enabled={allAnswered} onClick={next} label={step >= TOTAL - 1 ? '完成理解关 →' : '继续'} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Sentence analysis choice
  if (current.kind === 'sa-choice') {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        {progressBar}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
          <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: '#CE82FF' }}>「{current.sentence}」</p>
        </div>
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{current.q}</p>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 mt-1">
            {current.options.map((opt, oi) => (
              <div key={oi} className="px-3 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-base"
                style={oi === current.answer ? purpleStyle : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text2)', border: '2px solid transparent' }}>
                {oi === current.answer ? '✓ ' : ''}{opt}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          {current.explanation && <p className="text-sm mt-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>💡 {current.explanation}</p>}
        </div>
        <ContinueBtn enabled={true} onClick={next} label={step >= TOTAL - 1 ? '完成理解关 →' : '继续'} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Sentence analysis write
  if (current.kind === 'sa-write') {
    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        {progressBar}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4">
          <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed text-center" style={{ color: '#CE82FF' }}>「{current.sentence}」</p>
        </div>
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-4 flex flex-col gap-2">
          <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{current.q}</p>
          <WritingCanvas square showGrid />
          {current.blanks && (
            <details>
              <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: '#CE82FF' }}>查看参考答案</summary>
              <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {current.blanks.map((b, i) => (
                  <span key={i} className="text-sm px-2 py-1 rounded-lg font-kai"
                    style={darkMode ? { background: '#1D0040', color: '#CE82FF' } : { background: '#EEE4FF', color: '#9B30D0' }}>{b}</span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </details>
          )}
        </div>
        <ContinueBtn enabled={true} onClick={next} label={step >= TOTAL - 1 ? '完成理解关 →' : '继续'} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  return null
}
```

```jsx
import { useState } from 'react'
import { readingData } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'
import WritingCanvas from '../WritingCanvas'

// Steps: one per paragraph, then one per question
const PARA_STEPS = readingData.text.length   // 4
const Q_STEPS = readingData.questions.length  // 6
const TOTAL = PARA_STEPS + Q_STEPS

function ContinueBtn({ onClick, label = '继续' }) {
  return (
    <button onClick={onClick}
      className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
      style={{ background: '#FF4B4B', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #CC0000' }}>
      {label}
    </button>
  )
}

export default function Ex5Reading({ onComplete }) {
  const { darkMode } = useApp()
  const [step, setStep] = useState(0)
  const [showTrans, setShowTrans] = useState({})

  function speak(text) {
    window.speechSynthesis.cancel()
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text)
    u.lang = 'zh-CN'; u.rate = 0.8
    window.speechSynthesis.speak(u)
  }

  function next() {
    if (step >= TOTAL - 1) {
      onComplete()
    } else {
      setStep(s => s + 1)
    }
  }

  const answerStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#3D0000', color: '#FF6B6B' }
    : { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000' }

  // Progress bar
  const progressBar = (
    <div className="flex gap-1 items-center">
      {Array.from({ length: TOTAL }).map((_, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="flex-1 h-2 rounded-full transition-all"
          style={{ background: i < step ? '#FF4B4B' : i === step ? '#FF4B4B88' : 'var(--bg2)' }} />
      ))}
      <span className="text-xs shrink-0 ml-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{step + 1}/{TOTAL}</span>
    </div>
  )

  // Paragraph steps 0 to PARA_STEPS-1
  if (step < PARA_STEPS) {
    const para = readingData.text[step]
    const isShowing = showTrans[step]

    return (
      <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
        {progressBar}

        {step === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-4xl mb-1">🕯️</div>
            <h3 className="font-kai text-2xl font-bold" style={{ color: '#FF4B4B' }}>凿壁偷光</h3>
            <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>课外拓展阅读</p>
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
            <p className="font-kai text-xl leading-relaxed flex-1" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{para.original}</p>
            <button onClick={() => speak(para.original)}
              className="w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 text-lg"
              style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>🔊</button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {para.notes.map((n, i) => (
              <span key={i} className="text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full" style={{ background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>📌 {n}</span>
            ))}
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => setShowTrans(p => ({ ...p, [step]: !p[step] }))}
            className="text-sm py-2 rounded-xl transition-all"
            style={{ border: '1.5px dashed #FF4B4B', color: '#FF4B4B' }}>
            {isShowing ? '收起译文 ↑' : '查看译文 ↓'}
          </button>
          {isShowing && (
            <p className="text-base leading-relaxed animate-pop" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{para.translation}</p>
          )}
        </div>

        <ContinueBtn onClick={next} label={step < PARA_STEPS - 1 ? '继续阅读 →' : '开始练习 →'} />
      </div>
    )
  }

  // Question steps PARA_STEPS to TOTAL-1
  const qi = step - PARA_STEPS
  const q = readingData.questions[qi]

  return (
    <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto px-5 py-6 flex flex-col gap-5">
      {progressBar}
      <p className="text-xs text-center font-semibold" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>阅读练习 {qi + 1}/{Q_STEPS}</p>

      <div className="glass rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3">
        <p className="text-base font-semibold leading-relaxed" style={{ color: 'var(--text)' }}>{qi + 1}. {q.q}</p>
        <WritingCanvas square={q.type === 'open'} height={q.type === 'open' ? 200 : 90} showGrid />
        {(q.answer || q.reference) && (
          <details>
            <summary className="text-sm cursor-pointer" style={{ color: '#FF4B4B' }}>查看参考答案</summary>
            <div className="mt-2 text-base px-3 py-2 rounded-xl font-kai animate-pop" style={answerStyle}>
              {q.reference || q.answer}
            </div>
          </details>
        )}
      </div>

      <ContinueBtn onClick={next} label={step >= TOTAL - 1 ? '完成拓展关 →' : '继续'} />
    </div>
  )
}
```

```jsx
import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
import { calligraphyChars } from '../../data/exercises'
import { useApp } from '../../context/AppContext'

function getEffectiveColor(color, darkMode) {
  if (!darkMode) return color
  const hex = color.replace('#', '')
  const r = parseInt(hex.substr(0, 2), 16)
  const g = parseInt(hex.substr(2, 2), 16)
  const b = parseInt(hex.substr(4, 2), 16)
  const lum = (0.299 * r + 0.587 * g + 0.114 * b) / 255
  return lum < 0.3 ? '#E8E8E8' : color
}

export default function Ex6Calligraphy({ onComplete }) {
  const { penColor, darkMode } = useApp()
  const effectiveColor = getEffectiveColor(penColor, darkMode)

  const [charIdx, setCharIdx] = useState(0)
  const [charSize, setCharSize] = useState(220)
  const [mode, setMode] = useState('watch')
  const [practiced, setPracticed] = useState([])
  const [hasDrawing, setHasDrawing] = useState(false)
  const canvasRef = useRef(null)
  const ctxRef = useRef(null)
  const drawing = useRef(false)
  const lastPoint = useRef(null)
  const lastTime = useRef(Date.now())
  const current = calligraphyChars[charIdx]
  const canvasH = Math.max(260, charSize + 80)
  const total = calligraphyChars.length

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current
    if (!canvas || mode === 'watch') return
    const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    const w = canvas.offsetWidth
    canvas.width = w * dpr
    canvas.height = canvasH * dpr
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    ctx.scale(dpr, dpr)
    ctxRef.current = ctx
    paintBackground(ctx, w, canvasH)
  }, [mode, charIdx, darkMode, canvasH])

  function paintBackground(ctx, w, h) {
    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, w, h)
    ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(18,20,30,0.85)' : 'rgba(252,250,246,0.92)'
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h)
    const gc = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
    ctx.strokeStyle = gc; ctx.lineWidth = 1
    ctx.strokeRect(4, 4, w - 8, h - 8)
    ctx.setLineDash([6, 6])
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(w / 2, 4); ctx.lineTo(w / 2, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(4, h / 2); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h / 2)
    ctx.stroke(); ctx.setLineDash([])
    ctx.strokeStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.04)'
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(4, 4); ctx.lineTo(w - 4, h - 4)
    ctx.moveTo(w - 4, 4); ctx.lineTo(4, h - 4)
    ctx.stroke()
    if (mode === 'trace') {
      ctx.font = `bold ${Math.min(w, h) * 0.76}px "Kaiti SC","STKaiti",serif`
      ctx.fillStyle = darkMode ? 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.08)'
      ctx.textAlign = 'center'; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
      ctx.fillText(current.char, w / 2, h / 2)
    }
  }

  function getPos(e) {
    const r = canvasRef.current.getBoundingClientRect()
    return { x: e.clientX - r.left, y: e.clientY - r.top, pressure: e.pressure > 0 ? e.pressure : 0.5 }
  }

  function brushW(pressure, velocity) {
    const p = Math.max(0.15, pressure)
    const v = Math.max(0.12, 1 - velocity * 0.065)
    return 2 + 26 * p * v
  }

  const onDown = useCallback(e => {
    e.preventDefault()
    canvasRef.current.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId)
    drawing.current = true
    lastTime.current = Date.now()
    const pos = getPos(e)
    const w = brushW(pos.pressure, 0)
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w }
    setHasDrawing(true)
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = effectiveColor; ctx.fill()
  }, [effectiveColor])

  const onMove = useCallback(e => {
    if (!drawing.current || !lastPoint.current) return
    e.preventDefault()
    const now = Date.now()
    const dt = Math.max(1, now - lastTime.current)
    const pos = getPos(e)
    const last = lastPoint.current
    const dx = pos.x - last.x, dy = pos.y - last.y
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy)
    if (dist < 0.4) return
    const w2 = brushW(pos.pressure, dist / dt)
    const w1 = last.w
    const nx = -dy / dist, ny = dx / dist
    const ctx = ctxRef.current
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.moveTo(last.x + nx * w1 / 2, last.y + ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(pos.x + nx * w2 / 2, pos.y + ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(pos.x - nx * w2 / 2, pos.y - ny * w2 / 2)
    ctx.lineTo(last.x - nx * w1 / 2, last.y - ny * w1 / 2)
    ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle = effectiveColor; ctx.fill()
    ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(pos.x, pos.y, w2 / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fillStyle = effectiveColor; ctx.fill()
    lastTime.current = now
    lastPoint.current = { ...pos, w: w2 }
  }, [effectiveColor])

  const onUp = useCallback(() => { drawing.current = false; lastPoint.current = null }, [])

  function clearCanvas() {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current; const ctx = ctxRef.current
    paintBackground(ctx, canvas.offsetWidth, canvasH)
    setHasDrawing(false)
  }

  function next() {
    setPracticed(p => [...new Set([...p, charIdx])])
    if (charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1) {
      setCharIdx(i => i + 1); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false)
    } else { onComplete() }
  }

  const practicedStyle = darkMode
    ? { background: '#1A3300', color: '#58CC02' }
    : { background: '#D7FFB8', color: '#2D9B00' }

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: '100vh', background: 'var(--bg)' }}>
      {/* Progress dots at top */}
      <div className="px-5 pt-4 flex gap-1.5 items-center justify-center">
        {calligraphyChars.map((c, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-2.5 rounded-full transition-all"
            style={{
              width: i === charIdx ? 20 : 10,
              background: practiced.includes(i) ? '#58CC02' : i === charIdx ? '#E9A825' : 'var(--bg2)',
            }} />
        ))}
        <span className="text-xs ml-2" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{charIdx + 1}/{total}</span>
      </div>

      {/* Char strip */}
      <div className="px-5 pt-3 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
        {calligraphyChars.map((c, i) => (
          <button key={i} onClick={() => { setCharIdx(i); setMode('watch'); setHasDrawing(false) }}
            className="shrink-0 w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl font-kai text-2xl font-bold transition-all"
            style={i === charIdx
              ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white', boxShadow: '0 3px 0 #B07A00', transform: 'scale(1.06)' }
              : practiced.includes(i) ? practicedStyle
              : { background: 'var(--bg2)', color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
            {practiced.includes(i) ? '✓' : c.char}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      <div className="px-5 flex flex-col gap-4 pb-8">
        {/* Info row */}
        <div className="flex items-baseline gap-3">
          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 56, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1 }}>{current.char}</span>
          <span className="text-xl" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{current.pinyin}</span>
          <span className="text-base" style={{ color: 'var(--text2)' }}>{current.meaning}</span>
          <span className="ml-auto text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{practiced.length}/{total}</span>
        </div>

        {/* BIG reference character */}
        {mode === 'watch' && (
          <div className="glass rounded-3xl flex items-center justify-center animate-pop"
            style={{ height: charSize + 60, background: 'var(--bg2)' }}>
            <div className="font-kai font-bold select-none"
              style={{ fontSize: charSize, color: '#E9A825', lineHeight: 1, fontFamily: '"Kaiti SC","STKaiti","楷体",serif' }}>
              {current.char}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Size slider */}
        <div className="glass rounded-2xl px-5 py-3.5 flex items-center gap-4">
          <span className="font-kai" style={{ fontSize: 18, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>小</span>
          <input type="range" min="120" max="340" value={charSize}
            onChange={e => setCharSize(Number(e.target.value))}
            className="flex-1 cursor-pointer" style={{ accentColor: '#E9A825' }} />
          <span className="font-kai font-bold" style={{ fontSize: 32, color: 'var(--text3)' }}>大</span>
          <span className="text-sm w-12 text-right" style={{ color: 'var(--text3)' }}>{charSize}</span>
        </div>

        {/* Mode tabs */}
        <div className="glass flex rounded-2xl p-1.5 gap-1">
          {[['watch', '👁 看', '观察字形'], ['trace', '🖊 描', '描红练习'], ['free', '✍️ 写', '独立书写']].map(([m, label, tip]) => (
            <button key={m} onClick={() => { setMode(m); setHasDrawing(false) }}
              className="flex-1 py-2.5 rounded-xl text-sm font-bold transition-all flex flex-col items-center"
              style={mode === m ? { background: '#E9A825', color: 'white' } : { color: 'var(--text3)' }}>
              <span>{label}</span>
              <span className="text-xs font-normal opacity-75">{tip}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Canvas */}
        {(mode === 'trace' || mode === 'free') && (
          <div className="relative rounded-2xl overflow-hidden">
            <canvas ref={canvasRef}
              style={{ width: '100%', height: canvasH, display: 'block', touchAction: 'none', borderRadius: 16, border: '2px solid var(--card-border)', cursor: 'crosshair' }}
              onPointerDown={onDown} onPointerMove={onMove}
              onPointerUp={onUp} onPointerLeave={onUp} onPointerCancel={onUp} />
            {hasDrawing && (
              <button onClick={clearCanvas}
                className="absolute top-3 right-3 w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm shadow-lg"
                style={{ background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--card-border)', color: 'var(--text2)' }}>✕</button>
            )}
            {mode === 'trace' && (
              <div className="absolute bottom-3 left-3 text-xs px-2.5 py-1 rounded-lg"
                style={{ background: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.35)', color: 'white' }}>描红模式</div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        <button onClick={next}
          className="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-lg active:scale-95 active:translate-y-1 transition-all"
          style={{ background: '#E9A825', boxShadow: '0 4px 0 #B07A00' }}>
          {charIdx < calligraphyChars.length - 1 ? '写好了，下一字 →' : '完成书写关 🎉'}
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
```
